feed.title: Jeff Bezos' Amazon Urges FCC To Prevent Elon Musk's SpaceX Proposal To Launch A Million Satellites
feed.summary: Amazon has filed a formal objection with the FCC against SpaceX's proposal to launch a million satellites, citing concerns about its feasibility, potential orbital congestion, and lack of detailed plans. feed.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff on thousands of layoffs at Jack Dorsey's Block: We all know that company has ...

feed.title: New hybrid system brings electric efficiency to regional aircraft
feed.summary: RTX is developing a new combined thermal/electric propulsion system for regional turboprop aircraft, aiming to significantly boost efficiency. The goal is to reduce fuel consumption by 30% and maintenance costs by 20%, while also enabling the use of 100% Sustainable Aviation Fuel.

feed.title: How Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Is Expanding Its Industrial 5G Security Footprint With Siemens

feed.title: Rodgers Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. and Enovix Corporation Announce Effectiveness of Registration Statement and July 12, 2021 Special Meeting of Stockholders to Approve Business Combination
feed.summary: Rodgers Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. (RSVAC) and Enovix Corporation announced that the SEC has declared effective RSVAC's Registration Statement on Form S-4 for their proposed business combination. A special meeting of RSVAC stockholders will be held virtually on July 12, 2021, at 10:00 a.m. ET to approve the merger. If approved, Enovix, a leader in advanced silicon-anode lithium-ion batteries, will be listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "ENVX," with the transaction expected to close around July 13, 2021.

feed.title: Does Onshape’s New Cloud MBD Capability Deepen PTC’s (PTC) Role in End‑to‑End Product Lifecycles?
feed.summary: PTC Inc. has launched a cloud-native Model-Based Definition (MBD) capability within its Onshape CAD and PDM platform, allowing engineering teams to embed manufacturing information directly into 3D models. This move aims to centralize product and manufacturing data, enhancing PTC's role in customers' end-to-end product lifecycles and AI-driven process improvements. While it strengthens PTC's intelligent product lifecycle story and growth catalysts, the article notes that investors should also consider ongoing risks from competition and market uncertainty.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Verisk Analytics (VRSK) After Recent Share Price Rebound?

feed.title: Uber Air Taxis In Dubai Test Multi Modal Platform Ambitions
feed.summary: Uber Technologies is partnering with Joby Aviation to launch an all-electric air taxi service in Dubai, integrated directly into the Uber app for combined air and ground transport bookings. This move represents Uber's ambition to expand beyond traditional ride-hailing into multi-modal transportation and leverage future mobility trends. While it's a test of Uber's platform for higher-priced, premium travel without the risk of aircraft ownership, investors will be watching its success as a "proof of concept" rather than an immediate revenue driver.

feed.title: Does Onshape’s New Cloud MBD Capability Deepen PTC’s (PTC) Role in End‑to‑End Product Lifecycles?
feed.summary: PTC Inc. has introduced a new cloud-native Model-Based Definition (MBD) capability within its Onshape CAD and PDM platform. This feature allows engineering teams to embed manufacturing information directly into 3D models, aiming to centralize product and manufacturing data in a single cloud-native model. The initiative is intended to deepen PTC's role in customers' end-to-end product lifecycles and support AI-driven process improvements, although the article notes it doesn't immediately alter the focus on SaaS transition or mitigate competitive pressures.

feed.title: Cummins' Fastest-Growing Business Isn't Trucks. It's Data Center Power.

feed.title: Microchip Technology Introduces LX4580 Mixed-Signal IC for Aviation and Defense Actuation Systems
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has launched the LX4580, a highly integrated 24-channel mixed-signal IC designed to streamline actuation control systems in aviation and defense. This single chip consolidates multiple functions, reducing system size, weight, and complexity for applications like More Electric Aircraft and guided defense systems. The device also offers a redundant architecture for safety-critical applications and comes with an evaluation board and documentation to accelerate design cycles.

feed.title: France's top court upholds Criteo's €40M GDPR fine - but the legal logic is contested
feed.summary: France's highest administrative court, the Conseil d'État, has upheld a €40 million GDPR fine against advertising technology company Criteo. The fine, originally issued by the French data protection authority CNIL in 2023, addresses multiple violations including lack of valid consent proof, inadequate information to users, incomplete data erasure practices, and insufficient joint controller agreements. While the court confirmed the violations, legal experts are disputing the evidentiary reasoning used to justify the full fine amount, particularly regarding the determination that all 370 million identifiers processed by Criteo constitute personal data.

feed.title: Moat, Valuation, and Uncertainty Changes as We Reassess Our Cybersecurity Coverage With AI In Mind
feed.summary: Morningstar has reassessed its cybersecurity coverage in light of AI's growing impact, noting that AI deployments are likely to benefit cybersecurity spending by increasing attack surfaces and fostering an adversarial dynamic. As a result, the firm has updated moat ratings, fair value estimates, and uncertainty ratings for several companies. Specifically, CrowdStrike and Cloudflare had their moat ratings upgraded to wide, while Tenable's was downgraded to none, and fair value estimates for these companies, along with raised uncertainty ratings for Palo Alto, Fortinet, Zscaler, CrowdStrike, and Gen Digital, were also announced.

Despite these challenges, Accenture, Cognizant, and IBM remain top picks due to their comprehensive AI offerings and current undervaluation.

feed.title: Updating Moat Ratings and Fair Value Estimates for Payroll Firms
feed.summary: Morningstar has updated its economic moat ratings and fair value estimates for several payroll firms due to the potential impact of large language models and agentic AI. The firm believes that these technological advancements introduce heightened uncertainty to the return structure of these businesses over the next 10-20 years, driven by more application layer economics, less evidence of current AI monetization, and exposure to seat-based pricing. As a result, Morningstar is downgrading the moat ratings for ADP and Paychex to narrow from wide, and for Paycom to none from narrow, while also lowering the fair value estimates for ADP and Paychex.

This platform expands on their existing B Cell Select® technology by using llama-derived antibodies, positioning MindWalk in a market projected to reach tens of billions of dollars. The launch is supported by peer-reviewed research in ACS Biomacromolecules, highlighting the platform's ability to achieve high potency, overcome drug resistance, and potentially prime the immune system, while also integrating with MindWalk's AI-driven LensAI™ for function-based candidate selection.

feed.summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) experienced a 2.9% drop in midday trading, with trading volume significantly lower than its daily average. feed.title: Millions impacted | Hackers infiltrate Conduent Business Services
feed.summary: Conduent Business Services, a company providing printing and mailing services, experienced a data breach between October 21, 2024, and January 13, 2025, affecting millions nationwide. Hackers accessed names, addresses, health insurance information, and Social Security numbers, with the company attributing a year-long notification delay to file complexity. Conduent is offering one year of free credit monitoring to victims, as similar incidents are becoming increasingly common, with over 3,300 data breaches reported in the U.S. last year.

feed.title: Petersburg Borough Assembly approves 10-year agreement for police gear
feed.summary: The Petersburg Borough Assembly has approved a 10-year agreement with Axon Enterprise Inc. for police equipment and services, totaling nearly $379,000. This extended contract offers perks like technology refreshes and locked-in pricing, saving the borough approximately $190,000 over the decade. The agreement covers tasers, body cameras, car camera systems, software, digital evidence management, and AI-assisted report writing, aiming to enhance accountability and reduce human error.

feed.title: What's Driving the Market Sentiment Around Applied Optoelectronics Inc?

This decline suggests a more bullish sentiment among investors, though the company's short interest remains higher than its peer group average of 7.76%. It would take traders an average of 2.09 days to cover their short positions.

feed.title: Jet.AI 2025 10-K: $9.18M Revenue, $1.52 EPS on $4.59M Net Income

feed.title: SunCar Forecasting Preliminary Unaudited 2025 Revenue of $498 million, Strong Q4 Growth of 24%, Second Half 2025 Profitability, and 20% Revenue Growth in 2026
feed.summary: SunCar Technology Group Inc. is forecasting unaudited 2025 revenue of $498 million, marking a 13% increase from 2024, with a strong Q4 2025 forecast of $160 million, up 24%. The company operates in the public safety communications and enterprise technology sector, providing communication networks, software platforms, surveillance tools, and integrated command center systems. Its expansion efforts include significant investment in research and development to enhance its technology capabilities.

feed.title: Storage, PPAs, data centers, thermal auction: Where Argentina's Central Puerto sees opportunities
feed.summary: Argentina's largest power generator, Central Puerto, has identified key growth opportunities in energy storage, corporate power-purchase agreements (PPAs), and a potential thermal supply auction. The company is also involved in an AI data center project with OpenAI and aims to leverage its existing assets and new capacity additions. Structural reforms in Argentina's power market are creating both challenges and new avenues for business development for Central Puerto.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Neutral on NICE Ltd. (NICE) Post Q4
feed.summary: Piper Sandler maintained a Neutral rating on NICE Ltd. (NICE) but slightly increased its price target to $124 following the company's Q4 earnings release. NICE exceeded analyst expectations with $3.24 adjusted diluted EPS and $786.5 million in revenue, driven by AI adoption and customer expansion. The strong Q4 results are expected to alleviate pressure on the stock after an earlier software downturn and disappointing Capital Markets Day.

feed.title: Backend Integrations From Artificial Intelligence Labs Threaten to Elastic's AI-Search Product
feed.summary: Backend integrations from AI labs pose a threat to Elastic's AI-search product, as indicated by a recent Morningstar analysis. This has led to a downgrade of Elastic's moat rating to "None" and a cut in its fair value estimate. The company's origins trace back to 2009 with Elasticsearch, and it currently operates in AI-search, observability, and security segments.

feed.title: Airgain CEO Suen sells $15,400 in AIRG stock
feed.summary: Airgain CEO Jacob Suen sold 3,704 shares of AIRG stock worth $15,400 to cover tax withholding obligations. This sale occurred as Airgain (NASDAQ:AIRG) trades below its sale price, and analysts expect a sales decline and no profitability this year. The company recently missed Q4 2025 earnings expectations but secured a $4 million purchase order and partnered with Nextivity Inc. to enhance 4G/5G solutions.

feed.title: 3 Market Movers: Hillcrest Energy Technologies Ltd. (HLRTF), Inuvo Inc (INUV), Smith Micro Software, Inc (SMSI)
feed.summary: This article examines the recent performance of three small-cap stocks: Hillcrest Energy Technologies Ltd. (HLRTF), Inuvo Inc (INUV), and Smith Micro Software, Inc (SMSI). It details their trading activity, stock price changes, volatility, and moving averages, highlighting their individual market movements. The market activity of each company reflects investor engagement and sector-specific influences such as the rise of electrification technologies for HLRTF and notable volatility for INUV and SMSI.

feed.title: Why Did PRSO Stock Surge More Than 120% Today?
feed.summary: Peraso Inc. (PRSO) stock surged over 120% after announcing that its 60 GHz millimeter-wave semiconductor technology was chosen by Israeli defense firm InTACT for a new drone identification system. The Identification Friend or Foe (IFF) system will help military forces distinguish friendly from hostile drones using Peraso's low-power beamforming wireless transceivers. Additionally, Peraso is in ongoing discussions with Mobix Labs regarding a potential acquisition, with both companies currently performing due diligence.

feed.title: EagleNXT Expands Defense Technology Portfolio with Investment in Autonomous Loitering Munition Developer
feed.summary: EagleNXT has strategically invested in Aerodrome Group Ltd., an Israeli developer of precision loitering munitions, to expand its autonomous defense and precision strike capabilities. This partnership strengthens EagleNXT's position in advanced uncrewed systems and opens the possibility for a U.S.-based joint venture, supporting the company's growth in strategic defense markets while aligning with broader U.S.-Israeli cooperation in autonomous technologies.

feed.title: Xperi (XPER) Reports 2025 Results, TiVo One Platform MAUs Grow Over 250% to 5.3M
feed.summary: Xperi (XPER) reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 results, demonstrating significant growth in its digital platforms. The company saw its TiVo One Ad Platform monthly active users increase by over 250% to 5.3 million and expanded DTS AutoStage presence by 40% to 14 million vehicles. Despite a slight revenue decrease due to a divestiture, Xperi achieved improved non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA and secured key partnerships, forecasting continued growth and positive free cash flow for 2026.

feed.title: Spotify (SPOT) Reports 751M MAUs, 290M Paid Subscribers in Q4 2025
feed.summary: Spotify reported Q4 2025 results, exceeding analyst expectations with 751 million MAUs and 290 million paid subscribers. The company's EPS reached 4.43 euros, significantly higher than the anticipated 2.74 euros, and net income surged to 1.17 billion euros. Spotify also announced plans to add another 8 million users in Q1 2026, projecting revenue of 4.5 billion euros despite recent price hikes.

feed.title: Key facts: Coherent Corp. Market Cap Hits $46.2B; Launches AI Cooling Tech
feed.summary: Coherent Corp. (COHR) has achieved a significant market capitalization of $46.2 billion, demonstrating its strong market position well above the S&P 500 threshold. The company recently launched its Thermadite™ 800 Liquid Cold Plates, a new AI accelerator cooling technology with high thermal conductivity designed to lower chip temperatures by over 15°C.

feed.title: Applied Digital (APLD) Prices $2.15B Private Offering for North Dakota AI Factory
feed.summary: Applied Digital Corporation announced that its subsidiary, APLD ComputeCo 2 LLC, priced a $2.15 billion private offering of 6.750% senior secured notes due 2031. The funds will be used to finance the development of 200 megawatts of critical IT load at its Polaris Forge 2 AI Factory campus in Harwood, North Dakota. The offering is expected to close around March 10, 2026, and the notes are backed by first-priority liens on the issuer's assets.

feed.title: Webull (BULL) Reports 2025 Revenue of $571M, 46% YoY Growth
feed.summary: Webull Corporation (NASDAQ: BULL) reported strong financial results for its first full year as a public company in 2025, with revenue reaching $571 million, a 46% year-over-year increase. The growth was driven by increased trading volumes across all asset classes and an 81% rise in customer assets to $24.6 billion. Key achievements include the launch of its AI-powered trading assistant Vega, surpassing 100,000 subscribers for 'Webull Premium,' and continued international expansion.

feed.title: Emerging Growth Research Issues Flash Report on Virtuix Holdings Inc. with a Bullish View
feed.summary: Emerging Growth Research has released a Flash Report on Virtuix Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq:VTIX), maintaining a bullish outlook despite a recent stock sell-off. The report highlights Virtuix's strong market position in full-body virtual reality, strategic developments including European expansion and a partnership with Meta, and robust production capacity. While the company's valuation currently appears high based on current revenue, projected growth into 2027 could align it with industry averages, making the current share price a reasonable entry point for long-term investors.

feed.title: Fiverr (FVRR) reports 2025 revenue of $430.9M, 10.1% YoY growth
feed.summary: Fiverr (FVRR) has reported its 2025 revenue, reaching $430.9 million, which represents a 10.1% year-over-year growth. This financial update provides key insights into the company's performance for the past year.

feed.title: Fiverr (FVRR) Reports 2025 Revenue of $430.9M, 10.1% YoY Growth
feed.summary: Fiverr (FVRR) reported 2025 revenue of $430.9 million, a 10.1% year-over-year increase, with an Adjusted EBITDA margin of 21.3%. The company is focusing on higher-value transactions, evidenced by increased spend per buyer and growth in transactions over $1,000, and is undergoing a transformation to scale AI-native capabilities. For 2026, Fiverr forecasts revenue between $380 million and $420 million, prioritizing disciplined investment and high-value work.

feed.title: Unity Software, Inc. Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Dynamics
feed.summary: Unity Software, Inc. has seen its stock evaluation revised amidst market fluctuations, with its stock currently priced at $20.73. The company has experienced significant volatility over the past year, with a 52-week high of $52.15 and a low of $15.33, trailing behind the S&P 500 in returns. Technical indicators show mixed signals, with bearish MACD but bullish weekly RSI, and overall a mildly bearish trend.

feed.title: MicroVision (MVIS) Is Down 33.3% After Heavy 2025 Losses And Lidar Pivot - What's Changed
feed.summary: MicroVision (MVIS) reported significant losses in 2025 with sales of US$1.21 million and a net loss of US$94.98 million, despite a strategic pivot towards software-centric lidar and acquisitions. The company's investment narrative now hinges on its ability to convert early contracts into substantial revenue, with new convertible notes highlighting ongoing funding risks. Analysts express concerns about commercialization timelines and continued reliance on new funding, making future contract wins critical for the company's financial health.

feed.title: Gladstone Commercial (GOOD) Reports 2025 Revenue of $161.3M, Core FFO of $65.7M
feed.summary: Gladstone Commercial (NASDAQ: GOOD) announced strong financial results for 2025, with total operating revenue increasing 8% to $161.3 million and Core FFO reaching $65.7 million. The company expanded its portfolio through $206.7 million in acquisitions, maintained high occupancy, and strengthened its balance sheet. However, the article also promotes an AI stock, suggesting it holds greater promise for returns than GOOD.

feed.title: MercadoLibre (MELI) Reports 45% Q4 Revenue Growth, Full-Year Operating Income Up 22%
feed.summary: MercadoLibre (MELI) reported a 45% year-over-year increase in Q4 net revenues and a 22% rise in full-year operating income for 2025, despite an EPS miss. The company's growth was driven by investments in high-growth areas like shipping subsidies and credit card expansion, as well as significant gains in its commerce and fintech divisions across key Latin American markets. AI integration also played a crucial role, boosting advertising revenue and improving customer service efficiency.

feed.title: 5M Kyivstar users send emergency texts via Starlink in blackouts
feed.summary: Kyivstar announced that 5 million customers have connected to its network via Starlink Mobile satellites as of March 6, 2026, enabling over 7 million SMS transmissions, including 376,000 in frontline areas within the last 30 days. This integration of satellite and terrestrial mobile networks addresses connectivity challenges during blackouts and in war-affected regions of Ukraine. Kyivstar plans to launch light data in 2026 to support emergency and government services, and is testing satellite-enabled services for various sectors including agriculture, demining, public safety, and financial POS transactions.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Texas Instruments (TXN) After The Recent Share Price Pullback
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) has experienced recent share price volatility, declining 6.9% in 7 days and 12.1% in 30 days, yet holds positive year-to-date and long-term returns. The article analyzes TXN's valuation using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio, suggesting the stock might be overvalued. It also presents bullish and bearish narratives with different fair value estimates, encouraging investors to consider various assumptions.

feed.title: Anterix (ATEX), Qualcomm (QCOM) Expand Collaboration for Next-Gen Utility Wireless
feed.summary: Anterix (ATEX) and Qualcomm (QCOM) have expanded their collaboration to accelerate the adoption of next-generation private wireless broadband for the utility sector. This partnership focuses on transitioning the industry to a comprehensive connectivity platform, enabling utilities to deploy and evolve private networks using industrial-grade IoT chipsets. Qualcomm’s Snapdragon SDX35-3 and SDX32-3 IoT modems will provide 4G and 5G cellular connectivity on Anterix's 900 MHz broadband platform, supporting future energy systems and distributed energy resources.

feed.title: NXP Semiconductors NV Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Dynamics
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors NV has undergone a stock evaluation revision due to changing market conditions, with its stock currently priced at $210.58. The company shows mixed technical indicators, including a mildly bearish MACD weekly and bearish RSI weekly. NXP's stock performance has lagged the S&P 500 over the past week and year-to-date, though it outperformed over a three-year period.

feed.title: Martin Shkreli's New Computing Firm Is Betting It Can Upend Nvidia's Business Model - NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA)
feed.summary: Martin Shkreli, known as "Pharma Bro," has joined Q/C Technologies Inc. as a strategic advisor and is promoting photonic computing as a technology that could disrupt Nvidia's GPU dominance in AI hardware. Shkreli argues that photonic computing, which uses light instead of electrical signals, can perform matrix multiplication (a core GPU function) much faster. While financial markets currently show skepticism about photonic computing as a near-term threat, Shkreli believes it could significantly impact the GPU market and related investment assumptions.

feed.title: Alphabet stock price slips below $300 as weak jobs data hits megacap tech
feed.summary: Alphabet's (GOOG) stock price slipped below $300 due to a weaker-than-expected U.S. labor report and ongoing pressure from Treasury yields, affecting megacap technology stocks. The stock hovered around a critical support level, with investors cautiously watching whether it can stabilize or face a deeper pullback. The company also faces pressure from its substantial capital spending plans for 2026 and legal uncertainties.

feed.title: Kroger taps Mahadevan for new AI role
feed.summary: Kroger has appointed Milen Mahadevan, president and CEO of its 84.51 analytics division, to the newly created role of chief data and AI officer. Mahadevan will be responsible for embedding advanced AI into Kroger’s business processes and consolidating all data and AI teams under his leadership. This strategic move highlights Kroger's commitment to leveraging AI for improved customer experience and productivity across the company, especially as it operates under new leadership.

feed.title: Corning, Inc. Hits Day Low of $131.71 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: Corning, Inc. experienced a significant stock decline, hitting an intraday low of $131.71, yet it has shown strong long-term performance with a 186.44% increase in stock value over the past year. Despite the recent downturn, the company maintains a solid financial foundation with a low debt-to-equity ratio and substantial net profit growth, indicating fundamental strength.

feed.title: A Look At Equinix (EQIX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Strength And Premium P/E Multiple
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) stock has seen significant recent gains, trading around $953, and has a strong 5-year shareholder return. While a narrative valuation suggests the stock is undervalued at $1,023.27 due to long-term digital infrastructure demand, its high P/E ratio of 69.4x compared to peers and its own fair ratio raises questions about whether its growth can justify the current premium. Investors are advised to consider both the potential rewards and risks, including reliance on substantial data center investment and a concentrated hyperscale customer base.

feed.title: Costco Talks Tariffs, Digital Growth
feed.summary: Costco reported strong Q2 sales, up 9.1% to $68.2 billion, with comparable-store sales rising 7.4% overall. The company is actively working to mitigate the impact of tariffs on customer prices and noted significant growth in its digitally enabled sales, which surged by 22.6%. Costco also lowered prices on several grocery items and plans to open 28 new warehouses in 2026, investing heavily in expansion and digital enhancements.

feed.title: Walmart Fails in Bid to Nix Website Patent Infringement Suit
feed.summary: A US District Court judge denied Walmart Inc.'s bid to dismiss a patent infringement lawsuit filed by Adaptive Avenue Associates Inc. The lawsuit alleges that Walmart infringed on patents related to systems for creating website presentations and navigating multiple websites. The judge stated that plausible factual disputes exist, requiring Walmart to continue defending against the claims.

feed.title: Broadcom (AVGO) CEO Forecasts $100B+ in AI Chip Sales by 2027
feed.summary: Broadcom CEO Hock Tan predicts the company's AI chip sales will exceed $100 billion by 2027, a significant increase from $20 billion in 2025. This growth is supported by strategic collaborations with hyperscale tech giants like Google, OpenAI, Meta Platforms, and Anthropic. Broadcom also announced a new $10 billion stock buyback plan after strong Q2 revenue outlook and doubling AI revenue.

feed.title: On Semiconductor Drops 5.6%: Short-Term Pessimism Versus Long-Term Confidence – What’s Driving the Decline?
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor (ON) experienced a 5.6% drop to $57.44, falling below its 200-day moving average and showing deeply oversold RSI indicators, signaling strong selling pressure. This decline is largely attributed to technical factors and broader semiconductor sector weakness, compounded by its high P/E ratio. Investors are evaluating if it's a buying opportunity or signals prolonged correction, with critical support levels and options activity being closely monitored for future direction.

feed.title: IBM Aktie: Spannungen allgegenwärtig?

Despite these challenges, the International Business Machines Corp stock is showing a slight upward trend today. feed.title: Tesla Sued by Texas Worker Claiming Assault by Austin Shooter
feed.summary: Tesla is being sued for over $1 million by Lillian Mendoza Brady, a former employee, who claims she was assaulted by Ndiaga Diagne, the individual police have identified as the Austin mass shooter. The lawsuit alleges Tesla failed to ensure workplace safety and negligently supervised Diagne, who reportedly had "known aggressive tendencies" and had assaulted Brady during a company-sanctioned prayer break in December.

feed.title: DeFi Development Corp. to Host X Spaces Event: “February 2026 Business Recap & AMA”
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) announced it will host a live X Spaces event on March 4, 2026, at 01:30 PM ET to provide a recap of its February 2026 business progress. The company, which has a treasury strategy focused on accumulating Solana (SOL) and participating in its ecosystem through staking and validator infrastructure, will make a recording of the event available afterward. The event is intended for shareholders and analysts, but no material nonpublic information will be disclosed.

feed.title: Red Cat Holdings (RCAT) Stock Surges to All-Time High on Drone Contract Wins
feed.summary: Red Cat Holdings (RCAT) stock surged to an all-time high of $18.78 on Friday, fueled by significant contract wins and a sharp increase in revenue. The company secured a second military drone order from an Asia-Pacific ally and was named a vendor for the War Department’s Drone Dominance Program. Analysts are mostly positive, with institutional investors increasing their stakes, despite the stock trading above its fair value.

feed.title: CVS teams up with Google Cloud to launch AI health platform
feed.summary: CVS Health is partnering with Google Cloud to introduce Health100, an AI-powered health platform. This HIPAA-compliant platform is designed to consolidate data from various sources including insurers, providers, pharmacies, and labs. The launch of Health100 is anticipated later this year.

feed.title: Airgain CTO Sadri Ali sells $5,105 in shares
feed.summary: Airgain Inc.'s CTO, Sadri Ali, sold 1,228 shares of common stock for a total of $5,105 to cover tax withholding obligations related to restricted stock units. This transaction occurred amidst a roughly 20% decline in the stock over the past year, though InvestingPro analysis suggests the company might be undervalued. Airgain recently reported Q4 2025 earnings below expectations but secured a significant purchase order and entered a strategic partnership to enhance 4G/5G coverage.

feed.title: What's Going On With DocuSign Stock Thursday?
feed.summary: DocuSign (NASDAQ: DOCU) shares surged on Thursday, despite a broader market selloff, driven by its recent partnership with Anthropic for their enterprise AI platform, Cowork. While the stock saw a short-term rise and trades above its 20-day SMA, it remains in a longer-term downtrend, down significantly year-to-date and over the past 12 months, with its current price closer to its 52-week low. Analysts maintain a Hold rating with varying price targets ahead of its upcoming earnings report on March 17.

feed.title: These Analysts Boost Their Forecasts On Marvell Technology Following Better-Than-Expected Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) reported better-than-expected Q4 earnings and revenue, driven by strong growth in its data center business. Following the positive results and optimistic fiscal year 2027 outlook, several analysts raised their price targets for the company, with some also upgrading their ratings. Marvell's stock jumped significantly after the announcement.

feed.title: Lantronix Expands Embedded Compute Platform With MediaTek-Based SOM Solutions
feed.summary: Lantronix Inc. has announced a significant expansion of its embedded compute platform with new System-on-Module (SOM) solutions based on MediaTek Inc.'s Genio family of System-on-Chip (SOC) platforms. This strategic move aims to broaden Lantronix’s solutions portfolio, increase market coverage for Edge AI deployments, and strengthen supply chain resiliency. The MediaTek-based SOMs will address high-volume, power-efficient Edge AI deployments and support the NVIDIA TAO framework, with a drone technology demonstration planned for Embedded World 2026.

feed.title: Does Hartford’s AI Push and Bigger Buybacks Change The Bull Case For Hartford (HIG)?
feed.summary: The Hartford Insurance Group is embracing AI to improve claims and underwriting processes while also increasing share buybacks. This strategy signals management's confidence and focuses on balancing technology spending with shareholder returns, though risks like catastrophe losses and pricing pressure remain. Despite these initiatives, the core investment narrative, requiring sustained core insurance returns and effective tech integration, is not fundamentally altered.

feed.title: ClearCardio, HeartBeam Team Up to Bring 12-Lead ECG Technology to Preventive Cardiology Market
feed.summary: HeartBeam and ClearCardio have formed a commercial partnership to integrate HeartBeam’s synthesized 12-lead ECG technology into ClearCardio's cardiac prevention program. This collaboration marks HeartBeam's entry into the commercial market and aims to provide high-fidelity, clinical-grade ECG readings for arrhythmia assessment in a convenient home setting. ClearCardio will also invest in HeartBeam, signaling strong strategic alignment and plans for broader expansion across the U.S.

feed.title: Arm Holdings PLC Stock (ARM) Moved Down by 4.01% on Mar 6: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Arm Holdings PLC (ARM) stock declined by 4.01% on March 6th despite strong Q3 FY26 results, primarily due to investor re-evaluation of its premium valuation and moderated growth expectations for future quarters. Analysts have lowered price targets, citing valuation concerns and broader market volatility in the tech sector. Technical indicators show a neutral to oversold condition for the stock, while fundamental analysis highlights its strong revenue and net profit within the Technology Equipment industry.

feed.title: Ooma, Inc. Hits New 52-Week High of $14.83, Up 68.8%
feed.summary: Ooma, Inc., a microcap company in the Telecom - Services industry, has reached a new 52-week high of $14.83, marking a 68.8% increase over the past year and significantly outperforming the S&P 500. The company demonstrates strong financial health with a 25.91% operating profit growth, a peak operating cash flow of $25.99 million, and an efficient inventory turnover ratio of 6.89 times. Its solid balance sheet is further supported by a debt-to-equity ratio of -0.19 and a return on equity of 4.24%.

feed.title: Philips Unveils Rembra CT Scanner to Speed Up Medical Imaging
feed.summary: Philips has introduced its new Rembra CT scanner, designed to accelerate medical imaging and manage high patient volumes in demanding environments. The system can produce up to 106 images per second and support 270 patient scans daily, improving diagnostic confidence. Philips also provided an upbeat 2026 outlook with expected comparable sales growth of 3% to 4.5%.

feed.title: Kforce, Korn Ferry, PAR Technology, ePlus, and TransUnion Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: A number of Professional Staffing & HR Solutions, Specialized Technology, IT Distribution & Solutions, and Data & Business Process Services stocks including Kforce, Korn Ferry, PAR Technology, ePlus, and TransUnion traded down after a dismal February jobs report showed an unexpected drop in employment. The report indicated a loss of 92,000 nonfarm payroll jobs and an unemployment rate increase to 4.4%, leading to concerns about economic health. PAR Technology, in particular, saw significant price volatility and was recently the subject of an activist investor's call for strategic alternatives.

feed.title: Turbo Energy Restructures Financing Amid AI Storage Growth
feed.summary: Turbo Energy S.A. has restructured its long-term financing with major banks, securing €4.87M ($5.3M) to support global expansion, particularly in AI-driven industrial electrification and energy storage. The company's stock has risen by 11.26%, driven by positive sentiment around its strategic advancements in AI-based solar-plus-storage solutions. This move aims to provide stability and mitigate industrial margin pressures amidst volatile global energy markets.

feed.title: Quantum Threats Are Real. These Companies Are Building the Fix
feed.summary: A recent report suggests that a quantum-enabled cyberattack could lead to trillions in economic damage, accelerating a global security overhaul. Companies like QSE Corp., Arqit Quantum, IonQ, Quantum Computing, and D-Wave Quantum are at the forefront of developing post-quantum cryptography solutions. These firms are building security layers, engaging in strategic collaborations, and acquiring key technologies to protect against current and future quantum threats.

feed.title: Cyngn Announces Date for 2025 Fourth Quarter and Year-End Financial Results
feed.summary: Cyngn (NASDAQ: CYN) has announced that it will release its 2025 fourth quarter and year-end financial results on Wednesday, March 25, 2026, after the close of market. The results will be available on the company's investor relations website, and Cyngn will not be hosting an earnings call. The company specializes in developing and deploying autonomous vehicle technology, specifically its DriveMod solution, for industrial organizations to address challenges like labor shortages, with products like the DriveMod Tugger and Forklift.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Commvault Systems (CVLT) After Its Steep One-Year Share Price Slide?

feed.title: PEGA Stock Surges on Launch of Vibe Coding Assistant in Pega Blueprint

The company also initiated its 2026 guidance with optimistic revenue and earnings projections, earning a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

feed.title: Ambarella (AMBA) Is Down 21.8% After Guiding to FY 2027 Revenue Growth of 10%–15%

Despite improved sales trends, net losses and reliance on volatile markets remain risks, but analysts foresee potential upside based on current forecasts.

feed.title: Iridium Communications Inc (NASDAQ:IRDM) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.15
feed.summary: Iridium Communications Inc (NASDAQ:IRDM) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend of $0.60 and a yield of 2.5%. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on March 31st to shareholders of record on March 16th, with an ex-dividend date of March 16th. The company's dividend appears sustainable with a payout ratio of 45.1% and analysts project earnings per share of $1.24 next year, suggesting a future payout ratio of around 48.4%.

feed.title: Kforce, Korn Ferry, PAR Technology, ePlus, and TransUnion Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know

This data, signaling widespread economic weakness, rattled investor confidence and pushed down various company shares. feed.title: Palantir Technologies Inc Stock (PLTR) Moved Up by 4.72% on Mar 6: Key Drivers Unveiled

The company's Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) is experiencing increased demand, contributing to positive market sentiment despite some intraday volatility related to high valuation and insider selling. However, the stock faces risks from rich valuation multiples, insider selling, weak international commercial growth, and increasing regulatory scrutiny in Europe.

feed.title: 4 obstacles impede paid Microsoft 365 Copilot adoption
feed.summary: This article identifies four key obstacles hindering the widespread adoption of paid Microsoft 365 Copilot: confusing naming conventions and disjointed functionality, high costs compared to competitors offering similar AI capabilities for free, difficulty in demonstrating clear ROI due to "camouflaged contribution," and compliance concerns. The author emphasizes that Microsoft needs to simplify its product strategy, improve consistency, and enhance reliability to drive adoption, especially as it moves towards agentic AI.

feed.title: INTU Stock Rises 18.3% Post Q2 Earnings: Should You Buy or Sell?
feed.summary: Intuit (INTU) shares gained 18.3% after reporting strong second-quarter fiscal 2026 results, with revenues and earnings per share beating Zacks Consensus Estimates. The software leader's success is attributed to its AI and human intelligence platform, driving growth across its small business and consumer ecosystems. Despite business seasonality, strong fundamentals, discounted valuation, and rising earnings estimates suggest a buying opportunity for the stock.

feed.title: KLA Corp. Hits Day Low of $1,390 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: KLA Corp. experienced a 3.15% stock price decline, reaching an intraday low of $1,390, despite a strong 99.68% return over the past year and positive year-to-date performance. The company maintains robust financial health with a high Return on Capital Employed (68.53%) and a low Debt to EBITDA ratio (0.46 times), indicating solid operational efficiency and debt management. With a market capitalization of $384,078 million, KLA Corp. shows resilience and strong fundamentals in the Electronics & Appliances sector.

feed.title: Kroger names chief data and AI officer
feed.summary: Kroger has appointed Milen Mahadevan as its first chief data and AI officer, emphasizing the grocer's commitment to accelerating AI across its operations. Mahadevan, who also leads Kroger's retail analytics subsidiary 84.51˚, will focus on developing "agentic" AI capabilities to enhance both customer experience and business productivity. This move aligns with broader retail trends where companies like Target and Albertsons are also increasing AI investments to boost efficiency and improve customer interactions.

feed.title: Gemini, Claude continue to gain share at expense of ChatGPT, BNP survey finds (GOOG:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: A recent survey by BNP Paribas indicates that Google's Gemini and Anthropic's Claude are steadily increasing their market share among consumers, primarily at the expense of OpenAI's ChatGPT. This trend is evidenced by a proprietary survey tracking website visits.

feed.title: Avoiding Lag: Real-Time Signals in (BWXT) Movement
feed.summary: This article provides a real-time analysis of Bwx Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: BWXT) stock movement, highlighting weak near-term sentiment despite long-term strength. It offers three distinct AI-generated trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—along with multi-timeframe signal analysis to guide investors. The article emphasizes the importance of these signals for positioning and risk management in potentially choppy market conditions.

feed.title: PDC Brands, Church & Dwight, Mars, Lowe's Execs to Discuss Intelligent Supply Chains at Analytics Unite
feed.summary: Executives from PDC Brands, Church & Dwight, Mars, and Lowe's will participate in a panel discussion at Analytics Unite 2026 to discuss intelligent supply chains. They will explore how autonomous and AI-enabled technologies can reduce risk, improve efficiency, and foster growth amid market volatility. The event, taking place in Chicago from April 7-9, will focus on leveraging advanced analytics to manage fluctuating demand and global disruptions.

feed.title: Accenture's Intangible Assets and Switching Costs Still Support a Narrow Moat
feed.summary: Morningstar analyst Luke Yang reaffirms Accenture's narrow moat rating, citing the company's strong intangible assets and high switching costs. Despite concerns about AI's impact on knowledge-based work, Accenture's prominent reputation, established customer base, and deep technological expertise continue to position it as a leading professional services provider. The report emphasizes Accenture's ability to offer comprehensive solutions to enterprise needs.

feed.title: Medpace, IQVIA upgraded at Barclays, Avantor cut (IQV:NYSE)
feed.summary: Barclays upgraded contract research organizations IQVIA Holdings (IQV) and Medpace Holdings (MEDP) as part of a review of life science and diagnostic tools stocks. The firm believes that concerns regarding AI-related disruption in the sector are overstated. However, Avantor (AVTR), Certara (CERT), and Pacific Biosciences of California (PACB) had their ratings cut by Barclays.

feed.title: Ford makes big shift into energy storage to keep battery plants busy
feed.summary: Ford is entering the battery energy storage system business, called Ford Energy, to repurpose a Kentucky factory originally planned for EV battery production, due to slower-than-expected electric vehicle sales. The company will produce large-scale energy storage units for utility companies and data centers, facing competition from established players like Tesla. Ford believes its manufacturing expertise and licensing of CATL technology give it an advantage in this new venture.

feed.title: Price-Driven Insight from (BVFL) for Rule-Based Strategy
feed.summary: This article provides a price-driven analysis for Bv Financial Inc. (NASDAQ: BVFL), highlighting a weak near and mid-term sentiment that contrasts with a strong long-term outlook. It details specific institutional trading strategies, including long, breakout, and short positions, along with AI-generated multi-timeframe signal analysis and risk-reward setups. The analysis suggests a potential 5.9% gain target against a 0.3% risk.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Technical Analysis: Is The Rally Already Over? - Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG)
feed.summary: Shares of Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: BKNG) experienced a significant rally this week, primarily due to news that OpenAI would not integrate direct bookings into ChatGPT. However, technical analysis suggests this rally might be short-lived as the stock has hit a critical resistance level. The article highlights historical price points where investor psychology created support and resistance, suggesting a similar dynamic is now at play around the $4,600 level.

feed.title: Philips Unveils Rembra CT Scanner to Speed Up Medical Imaging
feed.summary: Philips has introduced its new Rembra CT scanner, designed to significantly speed up medical imaging by producing up to 106 images per second and supporting 270 patient scans daily. This innovation aims to help hospitals manage high patient volumes and complex cases more effectively. The company also provided an upbeat financial outlook for 2026, forecasting comparable sales growth between 3% and 4.5% and a higher adjusted EBITDA margin.

feed.title: Are Unusual Machines’ (UMAC) Drone Goggles Reframing Its Competitive Edge in Commercial UAV Tech?
feed.summary: Unusual Machines (UMAC) is generating investor interest, particularly due to its ultra-low latency drone goggles and recent participation in the Emerging Growth Virtual Conference. The company's strategy focuses on attracting U.S. government and enterprise buyers, leveraging a recent $2.1 million purchase order for domestically assembled drone systems. While there is enthusiasm for UMAC's drone technology, investors are cautioned about the company's dependency on timely government orders and potential risks related to execution and revenue concentration.

feed.title: Paul Harris' Past Picks: Alphabet, Novo Nordisk & MSCI Inc.
feed.summary: Paul Harris, a portfolio manager at Harris Douglas Asset Management, discusses his previous stock selections including Alphabet, Novo Nordisk, and MSCI Inc. He provides an update on how these companies are currently performing in the market. The article features a video segment where Harris likely elaborates on his analysis and the market outlook for these investments.

feed.title: Logistics Stock Looks Solid Despite AI Disruption Buzz
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) stock is showing resilience despite concerns about AI disruption in the logistics sector. The stock is maintaining key technical support levels, including its 50-day moving average and 200-unit trendline on its 65-minute chart, and is trading above its previous earnings report closing price. This performance suggests potential for a rally towards late 2025 highs, with significant put support evident at the 175 strike.

feed.title: CoreWeave, Inc. (CRWV) Class Action Lawsuit: Investors Face March 13, 2026, Deadline
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against CoreWeave, Inc. (CRWV) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that CoreWeave made materially false and misleading statements regarding its ability to meet customer demand and its reliance on a single third-party data center supplier. Investors impacted by this are encouraged to seek lead plaintiff status by March 13, 2026.

feed.title: Information Services Group 10-K: $244.7M Revenue, $0.19 EPS
feed.summary: Information Services Group (ISG) reported full-year revenue of $244.7 million and net income of $9.341 million, with diluted EPS of $0.19 (adjusted non-GAAP EPS of $0.33). The company saw a modest revenue decrease but improved net income due to lower interest expenses and operating costs. Key highlights include a significant shift to AI consulting, increased Americas revenue, and growth in recurring revenue streams and product adoption.

feed.title: Information Services Group (III) Reports Strong Q4 Results with AI Focus
feed.summary: Information Services Group (III) reported robust Q4 results, driven by a significant increase in AI-related services, which contributed 35% to Q4 revenues and saw its AI-powered solution, ISG Tango, reach over $25 billion in contract value. The company achieved 6% revenue growth and a 24% rise in adjusted EBITDA, ending the year with a strong cash position. Despite positive financial indicators and analyst recommendations, investors are advised to be cautious due to a "grey area" Altman Z-Score, insider selling trends, and high stock volatility.

feed.title: Why Earnings From Quantum Pure-Plays Like IonQ Have Wall Street Salivating So Much
feed.summary: Wall Street is highly interested in quantum computing, with some analysts calling it "the next fire moment" in technology. Companies like IonQ are at the forefront, and one analyst projects IonQ could capture a significant share of the quantum market by 2035. This indicates strong investor confidence and anticipation for growth in the quantum computing sector.

feed.title: Infosys’ Switching Costs and Cost Advantage Support a Narrow Moat Amid AI’s Potential Disruption
feed.summary: Morningstar's analysis, authored by Luke Yang, asserts that Infosys possesses a narrow economic moat, supported by its switching costs and cost advantage, despite the potential disruption from AI. The company's comprehensive IT services portfolio and agile adaptability to new technologies are highlighted as key strengths in meeting enterprise tech demands. This assessment comes alongside broader considerations of AI's impact on knowledge-based work within the IT services sector.

feed.title: Peraso (PRSO) Stock Soars 115% Following Defense Contractor Partnership
feed.summary: Peraso Inc. (PRSO) experienced a significant stock surge of over 115% after announcing that its 60 GHz millimeter-wave semiconductor platform was selected by Israeli defense contractor InTACT for integration into a military drone Identification Friend or Foe (IFF) system. This partnership, spanning over two years, focuses on tactical military applications, with Peraso's low-power, directional beamforming technology designed to resist detection and jamming. For the micro-cap semiconductor firm, this defense sector win is seen as fundamentally altering investor perceptions regarding future demand and long-term program revenues.

feed.title: What's Going On With AgEagle Aerial Systems Stock?
feed.summary: AgEagle Aerial Systems (NASDAQ: UAVS) stock is trading slightly lower after the company announced a strategic investment in Aerodrome Group Ltd., an Israeli firm specializing in precision loitering munitions. This move aims to enhance AgEagle's autonomous defense technology capabilities and bolster its market position through international collaborations. The company is set to report earnings on March 17, 2026, with an estimated EPS of 35 cents and revenue of $3.5 million.

feed.title: Roth Capital Lowers PT on Playtika Holding (PLTK), Keeps a Hold Rating
feed.summary: Roth Capital has lowered its price target on Playtika Holding Corp. (PLTK) from $4 to $3, while maintaining a Hold rating. This adjustment follows the company's fiscal Q4 2025 earnings report, with the analyst foreseeing another year of no growth but positive margin expansion due to SuperPlay acquisition and direct-to-consumer revenues. Despite topping revenue estimates in Q4, the company's potential is noted, but some AI stocks are considered to have greater upside.

feed.title: Socket Mobile announces iPhone 17e scanner compatibility
feed.summary: Socket Mobile Inc. announced that its XtremeScan, DuraSled, and DuraScan Terminal scanning products are now compatible with Apple’s new iPhone 17e. The company, facing financial challenges including a ~21% stock decline over the past year and decreasing revenue, aims to support businesses deploying iOS-based data capture systems in industrial and commercial settings. The announcement highlights Socket Mobile's continued alignment with Apple and its focus on providing durable and reliable industrial scanning solutions through its CaptureSDK software.

feed.title: Coda Octopus to Host Q1 2026 Conference Call
feed.summary: Coda Octopus will host a conference call on March 17, 2026, to discuss its Q1 2026 results and provide operational updates. The company is highlighting its new Diver Augmented Vision Display (DAVD) technology and recent acquisition of Precision Acoustics Limited, both aimed at enhancing its technical capabilities and market competitiveness in defense and commercial sectors. Additionally, its subsidiaries continue to supply critical sub-assemblies to prime defense contractors, ensuring repeat orders.

feed.title: Ultrapar Participações (UGP) Reports Q4 2025 Earnings, Here’s What You Need to Know
feed.summary: Ultrapar Participações S.A. (UGP) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with revenue surpassing estimates at $6.66 billion and EPS largely in line with expectations at $0.0713. The company achieved record operational cash flow and recurring adjusted EBITDA, although net income for the quarter significantly decreased year-over-year due to non-recurring expenses and higher depreciation. Ultrapar Participações expects EPS of $0.46 for fiscal 2026 and $0.42 for fiscal 2027, with revenues projected to reach $26.52 billion and $26.72 billion, respectively.

feed.title: Can AI Initiatives & Improving Margins Drive Cognex Shares in 2026?
feed.summary: Cognex (CGNX) is strategically integrating AI into its industrial machine vision and optimizing its cost structure, leading to improved profitability and cash generation. The company raised its through-cycle adjusted EBITDA target to 25-31% for 2026, driven by operational expense reductions and portfolio optimization. Despite a premium valuation (P/E of 39.39), Cognex maintains a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) due to upward earnings estimate revisions and expects mid to high-single-digit organic revenue growth across various verticals, supported by a strong balance sheet with no debt.

feed.title: Option Traders Show Caution Toward Uber (UBER) as Stock Dips
feed.summary: Uber (UBER) stock recently experienced a minor decline, with options trading showing a preference for call options and an increase in implied volatility. Despite strong financial health marked by robust revenue growth and profitability, the company's valuation metrics present a mixed picture. Analysts remain positive, but increased put-call skew suggests a heightened interest among traders in downside protection.

feed.title: 20 Stock Funds That Flip-Flopped Their Category Rankings
feed.summary: This article identifies 20 stock funds that experienced significant shifts in their category rankings over the past year due to rotations in stock market leadership. It highlights funds that moved from worst to best, often driven by the resurgence of small-cap and value stocks, as well as the boom in chip companies. Conversely, funds that dropped from best to worst were often impacted by the underperformance of dividend-focused strategies, the chemical industry, and certain software firms.

feed.title: VNT or SYM: Which Stock Offers Greater Value at the Moment?
feed.summary: The article compares Vontier Corporation (VNT) and Symbotic Inc. (SYM) to determine which stock offers greater value. Based on Zacks Rank and various financial metrics such as P/E ratio, PEG ratio, and P/B ratio, Vontier Corporation (VNT) is identified as the stronger value pick with a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy) and an 'A' grade for value. Symbotic Inc. (SYM) holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and a 'D' grade for value.

feed.title: Guidewire shares rise after Q2 results beat expectations and full-year outlook was raised
feed.summary: Guidewire Software, Inc. (GWRE) shares rose by 3.9% following its fiscal Q2 2026 earnings report, which exceeded expectations with a 24% year-over-year revenue increase and a higher full-year outlook. The company reported strong subscription and support revenue growth, increased EPS, and authorized a new $500 million share repurchase program. Positive investor sentiment was also driven by commentary on durable demand for multi-year deals and continued cloud momentum, despite significant insider selling and mixed institutional investor activity.

feed.title: Cellebrite DI Ltd. Hits Day High with 7.27% Surge in Stock Price
feed.summary: Cellebrite DI Ltd. experienced a significant 7.27% surge in its stock price on March 5, 2026, outperforming the S&P 500. The company shows strong short-term growth and high management efficiency with a 21.60% return on equity and 40.53% operating profit growth. Despite impressive three-year performance, the stock trades at a premium with valuation risks, including a negative ROE of -36.43%.

feed.title: Tower Semiconductor Ltd (TSEM) Trading Down 3.86% on Mar 6
feed.summary: Tower Semiconductor Ltd (TSEM) shares declined by 3.86% on March 6, trading down to $115.93. Despite this drop, the company's average target price from 6 analysts is $141.13, suggesting a 21.74% upside, and the average brokerage recommendation is "Outperform." However, GuruFocus' GF Value estimates a downward potential of 49.45% from the current price.

feed.title: Amprius Technologies Delivers Strong Q4 Performance, Aims High for 2026
feed.summary: Amprius Technologies reported strong Q4 and FY25 results, with revenue more than doubling and a swing to positive adjusted EBITDA. The company projects over 70% revenue growth for 2026, driven by increased demand in defense and aerospace sectors and new partnerships. Analysts maintain a bullish outlook, anticipating significant market presence and revenue potential with expanded manufacturing in the U.S. and Korea.

feed.title: Applied Optoelectronics Shares Surge Amid Record Earnings and Strategic Moves
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (AAOI) shares surged by 10.54% following robust Q4 earnings that beat analyst expectations and an upgrade from B. Riley. The company anticipates strong Q1 revenue growth and is optimistic about its 400G and 800G product lines, especially with major clients like Amazon. Despite some director share transactions, investor confidence remains high, driven by strategic market maneuvers and technological advancements.

feed.title: GDS Holdings Stock Surges as Nomura Hikes Price Target
feed.summary: GDS Holdings Limited stock surged by 5.9% after Nomura increased its price target from $41.50 to $54.50, maintaining a "Buy" rating. The company is set to release its unaudited Q4 and full-year 2025 results on March 17, 2026, which is highly anticipated by investors. An Extraordinary General Meeting has been adjourned to March 10, 2026, adding an element of intrigue to the company's immediate governance plans amidst this positive market sentiment.

feed.title: PlusAI Shatters AI Speed Records With SuperDrive 6.0, Targets Full Driverless Launch In 2026
feed.summary: PlusAI has released SuperDrive 6.0, an advanced autonomous driving software designed for commercial freight operations, featuring capabilities like night driving and handling construction zones. This update significantly boosts AI model training speed by 10X and reduces data labeling costs, moving PlusAI closer to its goal of a scalable, fully driverless commercial deployment by 2027 using factory-built trucks. The company plans to go public via a SPAC merger with Churchill Capital Corp IX.

feed.title: ST Intros Automotive Drivers for Load Protection & High-Voltage Switching
feed.summary: STMicroelectronics has launched new automotive driver solutions tailored for the evolving power landscape in vehicles. The VNQ9050LAJ intelligent high-side driver manages and protects 12-V vehicle loads amidst electrical disturbances, ensuring reliability in systems like lighting and pumps. Concurrently, the STGAP2SA and STGAP2HSA isolated gate drivers target high-voltage switching applications in electric and hybrid vehicles, supporting IGBTs and silicon MOSFETs up to 1,200 V with features for efficiency and safety.

feed.title: Why Today’s Worst S&P 500 Stock Is Dropping on a Big Earnings Beat
feed.summary: Ciena's stock dropped sharply despite reporting better-than-expected earnings and raising its full-year guidance. The decline is attributed to high market expectations and ongoing supply chain challenges. Ciena is experiencing increased demand for its cabling and networking systems, especially from AI data centers.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Iridium Communications (IRDM) After This Year’s Strong Share Price Rebound
feed.summary: Iridium Communications (IRDM) has experienced a strong share price rebound recently, with short-term gains of 34.9% year-to-date, despite longer-term declines. A Discounted Cash Flow analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 65.3% at $23.95, with an intrinsic value of $69.07 per share. However, its current P/E ratio of 22.0x is higher than the industry average, indicating it might be overvalued based on earnings comparisons.

feed.title: No-Moat Wipro Is Vulnerable to AI’s Potential Disruption
feed.summary: Morningstar has assigned Wipro a "No-Moat" rating, indicating its vulnerability to AI-driven disruption, particularly in its business process outsourcing (BPO) unit. The company's reliance on labor arbitrage for repetitive tasks makes it susceptible to AI's advancements, unlike some peers with stronger value-additive services. This assessment comes as part of a broader review of IT service firms facing AI's impact on knowledge-based work.

feed.title: S6 Livestream Incentive Event – Winners Announcement
feed.summary: Marvel Rivals has announced the winners of its S6 Livestream Incentive Event, thanking participants for their dedication. Winners will be contacted via email before March 31st, and prizes will be distributed by April 20th, with potential logistical delays. Participants who meet specific entry requirements should check the provided image for their name, and for any issues, they can reach out to marvelrivalscreators@service.netease.com.

feed.title: PTC Inc. (PTC) Rises 6.7% Following Recent Earnings Announcement: Will the Momentum Persist?
feed.summary: PTC Inc. (PTC) saw its shares climb 6.7% after reporting strong first-quarter fiscal 2026 results, surpassing analyst expectations with non-GAAP earnings of $1.92 per share and revenue of $686 million. The company's growth is attributed to successful go-to-market initiatives and its Intelligent Product Lifecycle approach, with plans to divest Kepware and ThingWorx to focus on core software. Analysts have revised estimates upward, though the stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

feed.title: Northern Trust Up 12.5% in 6 Months: Buy, Hold, or Sell the Stock?
feed.summary: Northern Trust's stock has risen 12.5% in the past six months, outperforming its industry and the S&P 500. This growth is attributed to digital innovation, wealth management expansion, organic growth, and improved operating leverage. Despite a premium valuation, analysts are confident in Northern Trust's future earnings trajectory, leading to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) rating.

feed.title: Can Microchip's Expanding Portfolio Help Its Stock Deliver in 2026?
feed.summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) has underperformed its industry and sector due to macroeconomic challenges and high inventory levels, though its channel inventory is decreasing. The company's expanding product portfolio, particularly in AI infrastructure and defense, along with a restructuring plan involving the closure of Fab 2 and optimization of Fab 4 and Fab 5, are expected to boost its prospects and improve margins. Analysts project significant year-over-year increases in net sales and earnings for fiscal 2026.

feed.title: GE Healthcare to Highlight AI-powered, Cloud-first Software Solutions at HIMSS
feed.summary: GE HealthCare will showcase its AI-powered, cloud-first software solutions at HIMSS 2026, focusing on addressing healthcare workforce gaps and operational complexities. The company will present innovations including CareIntellect for Perinatal, Command Center, Genesis Radiology Workspace, Imaging 360, and Verisound Digital and AI Ultrasound Solutions, all designed to enhance efficiency and patient care. GE HealthCare is also a founding member of the HL7 Caliper FHIR Accelerator, working to improve data exchange between medical devices.

feed.title: Scotiabank Cuts Essex Property Trust (ESS) Target, Says Multifamily Recovery Still Uneven
feed.summary: Scotiabank analyst Nicholas Yulico lowered the price target for Essex Property Trust (ESS) to $278 from $284, reiterating an Outperform rating. The firm notes that multifamily markets are still showing uneven recovery with occupancy levels below pre-COVID figures, suggesting investors wait for clearer signs of stronger market growth. Despite the cautious outlook, Essex Property Trust recently announced its 32nd consecutive year of annual dividend growth, increasing its cash dividend by 0.8%.

feed.title: No-Moat EPAM Systems Is Vulnerable to AI’s Potential Disruption
feed.summary: Morningstar has assigned a "No-Moat" rating to EPAM Systems, citing the company's vulnerability to disruption from artificial intelligence. EPAM, an IT services provider focused on consulting, application development, and system integration, historically leveraged a large STEM talent pool in former Soviet Union countries. The soft guidance from recent earnings and the inherent nature of knowledge-based work in IT services make it susceptible to AI's advancements.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies, Inc. (A) Price Target Cut to $155 at Baird
feed.summary: Baird and TD Cowen have both lowered their price targets for Agilent Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:A) to $155 and $157 respectively, following Q4 results that were slightly below expectations. Despite the Q1 impact from East Coast snowstorms, which is largely recovered, the company reiterated its full-year FY26 core revenue growth guidance of 4%–6% and increased its EPS range. Agilent continues to return capital to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends, reinforcing confidence in its financial stability and demand.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies, Inc. (A) Price Target Cut to $155 at Baird
feed.summary: Baird and TD Cowen have both lowered their price targets for Agilent Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: A) to $155 and $157, respectively, following Q4 results that were slightly below expectations and Q1 results impacted by temporary disruptions. Despite these adjustments, both firms maintain Outperform/Buy ratings, with Agilent reaffirming its full-year FY26 core revenue growth guidance of 4%-6% and increasing its EPS range, signaling confidence in future performance. The company reported Q1 2026 revenue of $1.8 billion, core revenue growth of 4.4% year-over-year, and returned capital to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends.

feed.title: Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) Given New $90.00 Price Target at TD Cowen
feed.summary: TD Cowen has raised its price target for Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) to $90.00 from $85.00, while maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting a slight downside. This follows Marvell's strong Q4 earnings beat and bullish guidance for AI/data centers, which led to a significant share rally and multiple analyst upgrades. feed.title: RCAT Stock Climbs To All-Time High As Middle-East War Drives Interest In Defense Tech: Retail Says ‘This Will Easily Double’

The company's Teal Drones division was invited to participate in Phase I of the Pentagon's "Drone Dominance" Program, positioning Red Cat as a potential beneficiary. Retail investors on Stocktwits expressed strong bullish sentiment, anticipating further stock increases.

feed.title: Trip.com Group shares rise as investors refocus on strong results despite ongoing China antitrust probe
feed.summary: Trip.com Group (TCOM) shares increased by 3.5% after strong fourth-quarter 2025 earnings, with investors seemingly reassessing the impact of an ongoing antitrust probe in China. The company reported significant net income and revenue growth, while affirming that business operations remain normal despite the investigation by China's State Administration for Market Regulation. This rebound suggests that the market may have already factored in some of the regulatory risks.

feed.title: TeraWulf slides as bitcoin dips below $70K, pressuring crypto-linked miners
feed.summary: TeraWulf (WULF) experienced a 6.4% decline as Bitcoin dropped below $70,000, impacting crypto-linked miners. While WULF's earnings are sensitive to Bitcoin's price, the company is increasingly focusing on HPC leasing, including long-term agreements and over $12.8 billion in customer contracts. The movement could also be influenced by short-term profit-taking or positioning after recent investor events.

feed.title: Cloud Software Provider Salesforce to Lay Off 51 in San Francisco in May
feed.summary: Salesforce Inc., a prominent cloud software provider, announced it would lay off 51 employees at its San Francisco headquarters, effective May 1, 2026. This decision was revealed through a WARN notice filed on March 2, as the company adjusts staffing levels amidst broader industry restructuring. Salesforce, founded in 1999, specializes in customer relationship management (CRM) software and provides cloud-based enterprise solutions globally.

feed.title: Is Comfort Systems Scaling Modular Capacity for the Data Center Boom?
feed.summary: Comfort Systems USA, Inc. (FIX) is strategically positioned to benefit from the data center boom through its modular construction capabilities, which represented 18% of its 2025 revenue. The company plans to expand its modular footprint by 1 million square feet by the end of 2026 and is investing in automation to improve productivity. While strong bookings indicate healthy demand, the extended duration of these projects means revenue conversion may be slower, with significant payoff expected in 2027-2028 rather than the immediate future.

feed.title: ServiceNow Stock Climbs 16% in a Month: Hold Tight or Book Profits?
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NOW) shares have climbed 16.3% in the past month, outperforming the industry and S&P 500, driven by its expanding AI platform and large enterprise customer base. While the company faces short-term challenges like currency fluctuations and acquisition integration, its strong growth potential and rising earnings estimates suggest investors should hold the stock. ServiceNow's strategic partnerships and robust customer engagement underpin its long-term outlook, despite a current "Hold" rating from Zacks.

feed.title: Research Alert: Cve Upgraded To Buy On De-levering Potential Amid Crude Surge: Tp $29

feed.title: Thryv Holdings director Slater buys $9,720 in shares

feed.title: Oppenheimer Trims Target Price on CarGurus (CARG) to $38

Despite the cut, Oppenheimer remains optimistic about CARG due to its proprietary used car valuation data, strong dealer relationships, and new product offerings that are expected to drive high incremental margins and durable revenue growth.

feed.title: Fiserv to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Fiserv, Inc. (NASDAQ: FISV) announced its participation in two upcoming investor conferences in March. CEO Mike Lyons and CFO Paul Todd will present at the Wolfe Fintech Forum on March 11, and CEO Mike Lyons will present at the Wells Fargo 18th Annual Payments/Fintech Symposium on March 18. Live webcasts and archived replays will be available on Fiserv's investor relations website.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Snowflake Inc. Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against Snowflake Inc. (NYSE: SNOW) and its officers, alleging violations of federal securities laws. The lawsuit covers investors who purchased Snowflake securities between June 27, 2023, and February 28, 2024, claiming that the company made misleading positive statements while failing to disclose negative impacts on revenues and impending executive resignation. Investors are encouraged to join the case by April 27, 2026, to potentially recover damages.

feed.title: Peraso (NASDAQ: PRSO) Makes Nasdaq Top Gainer List on 60 GHz mmWave Drone IFF Military Contract
feed.summary: Peraso Inc. (NASDAQ: PRSO) has made the Nasdaq top gainer list after its 60 GHz mmWave technology was selected by Israeli defense contractor InTACT for a new military drone Identification Friend or Foe (IFF) system. This technology provides secure, directional, and low-power communication crucial for contested electronic warfare environments and battery-powered drones. The IFF system aims to prevent friendly-fire incidents and enable safe coordination between unmanned and manned forces on modern battlefields.

feed.title: BSTZ Crosses Below Key Moving Average Level
feed.summary: Shares of Blackrock Science and Technology Term Trust Common (BSTZ) fell below their 200-day moving average on Friday, trading as low as $21.33 per share and currently down about 2.6% on the day. The 200-day moving average for BSTZ was $21.74. The article also provides a one-year performance chart and highlights the 52-week low of $15.22 and high of $23.47 for BSTZ.

feed.title: Amtech Systems shareholders elect directors and approve proposals at annual meeting

Shareholders also approved the compensation for named executive officers on an advisory basis. The company recently reported Q1 2026 EPS of $0.03, exceeding expectations, though revenue fell slightly short.

feed.title: A Look At Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises (BW) Valuation After $2.4b AI Power Project Notice To Proceed
feed.summary: Babcock & Wilcox Enterprises (BW) has received a notice to proceed on a $2.4 billion AI power project, leading to a significant jump in its stock price and a swing to profit in Q4. Despite impressive recent performance and a large project pipeline, valuation models suggest the stock might be overvalued, with its current price of $11.80 exceeding a narrative fair value of $8.33 and a future cash flow value of $4.32. However, a sales multiple comparison suggests it may be cheaper than peers, indicating a potential market mispricing or underestimation of its future prospects.

feed.title: Amkor Technology (AMKR) Is Down 8.2% After LNG Cost Jitters Hit Arizona Expansion Narrative
feed.summary: Amkor Technology (AMKR) shares dropped 8.2% due to concerns over rising liquefied natural gas (LNG) costs, which impact semiconductor manufacturers. This comes as Amkor is investing US$7.00 billion in an advanced-packaging campus in Arizona, highlighting investor scrutiny on its cost base and future capacity plans. The article suggests that while the pullback is sentiment-driven, sustained high energy costs could stress Amkor's profitability and capital expenditure plans.

feed.title: Are Volatility and Insider Sales Obscuring TTM Technologies’ (TTMI) AI-Driven Investment Narrative?

Insider sales by a director are considered incremental, with the larger focus remaining on the company's capital investments in manufacturing facilities. The core investment thesis hinges on sustained demand for complex PCBs and mission systems in AI, data center, and aerospace/defense, despite high capital expenditure and customer concentration.

feed.title: LexisNexis expands Epic integration with identity verification capabilities
feed.summary: LexisNexis Risk Solutions has expanded its integration with Epic to enhance identity verification capabilities within the Epic Connection Hub. This expansion, set to launch in late 2026, will allow hospitals using Epic MyChart to select various LexisNexis tools like ThreatMetrix and Instant Verify to meet their risk requirements. The initiative aims to balance user experience and security in an industry frequently targeted by cybercrime, leveraging AI to combat sophisticated threats like deepfakes and fraud.

Rogers Communications, on the other hand, shows deeper value with a strong quarterly profit, cost reductions, and potential for future value unlocking through media assets and satellite connectivity.

This move positions Netflix to strengthen its storytelling ecosystem from creation to immersive fan experiences.

feed.title: Intuit Leads on a New Type of Renewable Energy Transaction: VPPA 2.0
feed.summary: Intuit has contracted 10 megawatts (MW) from the Mesquite Star wind farm through a new transaction model called VPPA 2.0, supported by Sustainability Roundtable, Inc. This innovative approach allows smaller, high-credit enterprises to participate in utility-scale renewable energy projects, enabling Intuit to meet its 100% renewable energy goal a decade early and target significant carbon emission reductions. The VPPA 2.0 model, designed for aggregated buyers, offers cost advantages and enables companies to cause new renewable energy capacity to be built.

feed.title: Corning Inc Stock (GLW) Moved Down by 4.15% on Mar 6: Drivers Behind the Movement
