Insider selling and reduced institutional holdings also contributed to the negative sentiment, overshadowing positive company news like the launch of Gorilla Glass Ceramic 3 and strong Q4 2025 financial results.

feed.title: Coherent Announces General Availability of Industry's First Dual-Laser QSFP28-DCO for Single Fiber Transmission
feed.summary: Coherent Corp. has announced the general availability of its industry-first dual-laser QSFP28-DCO module, enabling bi-directional 100G coherent transmission over a single fiber. This innovation addresses fiber-constrained network environments, allowing network operators to significantly increase capacity and extend reach up to 300km. The solution leverages proven technology and is designed to provide greater flexibility and scalability, particularly for Cable/MSO and wireless transport applications.

feed.title: Mangoceuticals, Inc. Announces PCT Patent Filing for MGX-0024 Antiviral Technology to Include Inhibiting Respiratory or Orally Acquired Virus Infection in Animals or Birds
feed.summary: Mangoceuticals, Inc. announced the filing of a Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) international application on February 26, 2026, for its MGX-0024 antiviral animal feed and drinking water additive technology. This filing aims to secure broad global patent protection for the technology, which has shown efficacy in preventing respiratory-related mortality in birds and prophylactic benefits against H5N1. The company and its partner, IntraMont Technologies, Inc., are seeking to protect and commercialize MGX-0024 worldwide, building on existing U.S. patent protection and filings in other key markets.

feed.title: Is Digital Realty Trust Stock Outperforming the Dow?
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR), a large-cap REIT specializing in data centers, has significantly outperformed the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) over the past three months, year-to-date, and over the past 52 weeks. The company's focus on AI and high-density computing, along with strong Q4 results, has contributed to its bullish trend. Despite lagging behind close rival Equinix (EQIX) in some short-term metrics, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an optimistic price target.

feed.title: Teradyne slides as fresh analyst downgrade amplifies valuation concerns after big run

The downgrade to "Hold" with a $270 price target was attributed to the stock's elevated earnings multiple compared to peers in the semiconductor equipment sector, potentially triggering profit-taking and de-risking. feed.title: Brokers Suggest Investing in Celestica (CLS): Read This Before Placing a Bet
feed.summary: This article analyzes Celestica's (CLS) average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.28, suggesting a "Buy" based on 18 firms, 15 of which are Strong Buy. It clarifies that ABRs often have a positive bias due to brokerage firms' vested interests and recommends validating ABR with the Zacks Rank, a quantitative model based on earnings estimate revisions. The article concludes that Celestica's Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) and increased consensus estimate for the current year support the Buy-equivalent ABR.

feed.title: Trade Desk: Downgrading Moat to None on Increasing Competitive Intensity Despite OpenAI Report
feed.summary: Morningstar has downgraded The Trade Desk's economic moat rating from narrow to none and reduced its fair value estimate to $33 per share from $35. This reassessment is due to increasing competitive intensity in the ad tech ecosystem, with value shifting towards vertically integrated platforms and major players like Google, Meta, and Amazon encroaching on Trade Desk's market. While a potential advertising relationship with OpenAI is positive, it is not seen as a complete solution to the structural disadvantages faced by pure-play demand-side platforms.

feed.title: HawkSearch By Bridgeline Enhances eCommerce Search for Global Industrial and Medical Gas Provider
feed.summary: Bridgeline Digital announced that its HawkSearch product has been selected by a global industrial and medical gas provider to enhance its eCommerce search and product discovery. HawkSearch's AI-powered capabilities, including visual and concept search, will enable faster product findability, greater merchandising control, multi-language support, and personalized customer journeys. The implementation aims to boost engagement, increase conversion rates, and support complex business requirements across multi-site and multi-lingual platforms.

feed.title: PlusAI unveils new autonomous trucking software with night driving and construction zone capabilities
feed.summary: PlusAI has released SuperDrive 6.0, an advanced autonomous driving software for commercial freight operations, featuring night driving and construction zone handling capabilities. This new version boosts AI model training speed by 10X and dramatically reduces data labeling costs, accelerating feature deployment. The company aims for fully driverless commercial deployment by 2027 with factory-built trucks, moving closer to 24/7 autonomous operations.

feed.title: SMR Cooperation Gains Full Momentum in Thailand
feed.summary: Korea Hydro & Nuclear Power (KHNP) and the Electricity Generating Authority of Thailand (EGAT) co-hosted an SMR Technical Seminar in Bangkok, aimed at fostering technical cooperation following their June 2025 MOU. The seminar, attended by experts from both countries, focused on SMR deployment conditions in Thailand, technical characteristics of innovative SMRs (i-SMR), and supply chain considerations. This collaboration is expected to advance Thailand's energy transition and expand SMR business in the ASEAN region.

feed.title: Telecom network expands to 16 million fiber miles, Lumen Technologies asserts

This expansion demonstrates Lumen's commitment to technological advancement and market connectivity.

feed.title: Cyberwarfare Threat Rises: Time to Boost Cybersecurity ETF Exposure?

feed.title: Better says AI app OKs home loans in seconds, challenging Rocket, UWM

The company asserts that this technology will save consumers thousands of dollars by streamlining the loan origination process.

feed.title: Bel Fuse spends $16M on dataMate to tap smart building networks

feed.title: Digi Acquires Particle to Extend Embedded IoT Reach

This acquisition is expected to significantly increase Digi's annual recurring revenue and provide engineers with a unified platform for hardware, connectivity, and cloud, thereby accelerating IoT solution development and deployment of edge AI. The deal combines Particle's platform with Digi's hardware, fostering a robust end-to-end pipeline for edge AI applications.

feed.title: GameSquare Appoints Amaree Tanawong as Chief Operating Officer

Tanawong brings nearly two decades of experience in scaling strategy, monetization, and operations from companies like YouTube and Meow Wolf. Her role will focus on strategic planning, operational scalability, and financial performance to drive GameSquare's growth.

(AXON), highlighting its dominance in public safety technology with consistent revenue growth, strong gross margins, and a solid financial position. feed.title: Rocket Lab (RKLB) Introduces Silicon Solar Arrays for Space-Based Data Centers
feed.summary: Rocket Lab Corporation (RKLB) has introduced advanced silicon solar arrays designed to power gigawatt-scale space-based data centers, addressing terrestrial constraints on land, water, and power. This innovative solution aims to provide scalable, low-cost power by harnessing space's limitless solar energy and cold environment, reducing reliance on geopolitically sensitive materials. The company's expansion into flexible silicon modules, supported by a $23.9 million award from the US CHIPS and Science Act, underscores a move towards more resilient and domestically produced critical space infrastructure.

Companies like Starfighters Space, AeroVironment, Curtiss-Wright, Elbit Systems, and Archer Aviation are positioned to benefit from increased government spending on space infrastructure, defense manufacturing, and advanced aerial systems. feed.title: Quantum scale-up Pasqal plans $2B SPAC listing, promises to ‘remain French’

Despite leveraging US markets for scale, Pasqal emphasizes its commitment to remaining a French entity with headquarters in Palaiseau and active involvement from French backers like Bpifrance. The company, which underwent executive reshuffles, aims to develop a fault-tolerant quantum computer by the end of the decade, investing heavily in R&D and planning to double its production capacity.

feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that CoreWeave made material misstatements and omissions regarding its ability to meet customer demand and its reliance on a single third-party data center supplier. Investors have until March 13, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status in the case.

feed.title: SPAC attack: Einride bets $1.35B that their SPAC will be different
feed.summary: Swedish electric and autonomous trucking company Einride is pursuing a $1.35 billion SPAC deal with Legato Merger Corp. III, following a $113 million oversubscribed capital raise. This valuation is lower than previous projections but Einride executives view it as a win, distinguishing their approach by focusing on a digital freight and logistics platform rather than direct EV manufacturing. They aim to avoid the failures of past EV startup SPACs by sourcing trucks from partners and leveraging their established autonomous driving technology.

feed.title: China hiring platform BOSS Zhipin to unveil 2025 results March 18
feed.summary: KANZHUN LIMITED (Nasdaq: BZ), operator of the BOSS Zhipin online recruitment platform, announced it will report its unaudited consolidated results for Q4 and full year ended December 31, 2025, before the U.S. market opens on March 18, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 8:00 PM Beijing Time / 8:00 AM ET to discuss the results, with participants required to pre-register. Historically, similar earnings date announcements have had a muted impact on BZ's stock price.

feed.title: Phillip Securities Maintains a Buy on Salesforce (CRM)
feed.summary: Phillip Securities analyst Paul Chew maintained a Buy rating on Salesforce (CRM) with a price target of $253, citing strong fiscal 2026 performance and optimism for fiscal 2027. The analyst highlighted expected double-digit revenue growth driven by Platform Cloud and expanding AI revenues with rapid adoption of Agentic AI. This positive outlook contrasts with Citi's Tyler Radke, who reiterated a Hold rating while raising the price target to $200.

feed.title: Liberty Broadband Corporation Announces 2026 Virtual Annual Meeting of Stockholders
feed.summary: Liberty Broadband Corporation (Nasdaq: LBRDA, LBRDK, LBRDP) announced it will hold its 2026 virtual Annual Meeting of Stockholders on Monday, May 11, 2026, at 11:15 a.m. M.T. feed.title: Can FuelCell Energy Power Data Centers Amid Grid Limits?

The company highlights its modular, behind-the-meter systems as offering quicker deployment, scalability, and independence from strained utility grids, along with operational benefits like continuous power and low emissions. Competitors like Bloom Energy (BE) and Enphase Energy (ENPH) are also addressing the growing power needs of data centers with their respective energy solutions.

feed.title: A Look at Nayax's Upcoming Earnings Report

feed.title: This four-legged AI robot patrols places too dangerous for people
feed.summary: AMC Robotics showcased its Kyro AI-powered quadruped robot at the Tokyo Security Show 2026. The robot demonstrated autonomous navigation, abnormal heat detection, and remote operation for high-risk environments like chemical plants and industrial facilities. This initiative addresses personnel shortages and aims to enhance operational safety and efficiency in security and inspection tasks.

feed.title: UBS lowers PVH stock price target on margin concerns, keeps buy
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for PVH Corp (NYSE:PVH) from $148 to $120, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock, citing concerns about gross margins. Despite the reduced target, UBS expects PVH to report solid fourth-quarter earnings and provide strong fiscal 2026 guidance, which they believe will boost the stock's valuation. The firm also noted PVH's recent partnership with OpenAI to integrate AI into its operations, aiming to enhance product design, demand planning, and customer engagement.

feed.title: SEALSQ Announces Comprehensive 2026 Certification Roadmap
feed.summary: SEALSQ has announced its comprehensive 2026 certification roadmap for its QS7001 Secure Element and QVault TPM hardware product lines, with all four post-quantum security products on track for Common Criteria, FIPS 140-3, and TCG Certifications through Q4 2026. Production samples for first-generation products are now available and the company aims to help organizations transition to post-quantum cryptography confidently, especially with upcoming mandatory migration deadlines like the NSA CNSA 2.0 January 2027 compliance timeline. This ensures a predictable timetable for delivering hardware-anchored post-quantum security.

feed.title: BHP Group Limited (BHP) Advances Strategic Deals to Strengthen Copper Supply Chain
feed.summary: BHP Group Limited (BHP) has made strategic moves to bolster its copper supply chain, including an agreement for Faraday Copper Corp to acquire its San Manuel property in Arizona in exchange for a 30% equity interest in Faraday. Additionally, BHP entered a long-term streaming agreement with Wheaton Precious Metals International, receiving an upfront payment of $4.3 billion for future silver production from the Antamina mine. These actions reinforce BHP's position as a major producer of essential commodities, particularly copper.

This boost comes as NVIDIA reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates with $1.62 EPS and $68.13 billion in revenue, driven largely by data-center demand. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for NVIDIA, with an average price target of $273.64, although recent discussions acknowledge potential challenges such as China's production pullback and stricter export regulations for AI chips.

feed.title: Ambiq Micro (AMBQ) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: Ambiq Micro reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding guidance with $20.7 million in net sales, marking a 2% year-over-year increase and their highest for the year. The company saw non-GAAP gross profit surge by 75.5% to $9.4 million, driven by a strategic shift towards edge AI solutions and reduced reliance on the Mainland China market. Looking ahead to 2026, Ambiq Micro projects continued strong growth with net sales estimated between $21 million and $22 million, supported by new customer ramps and increased adoption of their Apollo 5 products, alongside significant investments in R&D for their Atomic and Apollo product families.

feed.title: Nuvve Partners with OMNIA Global to Address 1GW Development Pipeline with First 50MW/75MWh Battery Energy Storage System in Sweden

Nuvve will own and manage the facility, providing market access services to optimize revenue in Sweden, a strategic market for energy storage due to its climate goals and high renewable energy penetration. This collaboration expands Nuvve's European footprint and aims to generate significant recurring revenue through asset ownership and management.

feed.title: Garmin Fenix 7 in 2026: Still the adventure watch to beat?
feed.summary: Despite being released in 2022, the Garmin Fenix 7 remains a highly relevant and competitive adventure watch in 2026 due to continuous major software updates, enhanced features, and strong performance in battery life and GPS accuracy. It is particularly valued by runners, triathletes, hikers, and backcountry skiers for its robust training data, mapping capabilities, and durable build, offering a compelling value proposition, especially when found on sale. While newer Garmin models and smartwatches offer different advantages, the Fenix 7 continues to occupy a sweet spot for outdoor enthusiasts prioritizing reliability and comprehensive activity tracking.

The game introduces significant improvements across all modes, such as CM Punk's personalized "2K Showcase: Punked," expanded Creation Suite options, and a new storyline in "The Island." The Standard Edition, with CM Punk as the cover star, is set to release on March 13, 2026, offering diverse gameplay and customization for fans.

feed.title: 200 years of gas know-how: Teledyne GMI and Southern Cross team up in U.S.

The partnership will provide localized expertise and support to the gas utility sector in the Southeast United States.

The technology aims to enhance drone capabilities for both defense and commercial uses in challenging environments and represents a strategic investment in the future of autonomous systems.

feed.summary: Intrusion Inc. (NASDAQ:INTZ) will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, after market close. Following the announcement, CEO Tony Scott and CFO Kimberly Pinson will host a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss the financial results with analysts and investors. Intrusion Inc. is a Plano, Texas-based cybersecurity company specializing in advanced threat intelligence through its TraceCop database and its Intrusion Shield network security platform.

feed.title: Does Zions’ Technology Leadership Reshuffle Reframe Its Long‑Term Digital Strategy Narrative (ZION)?
feed.summary: Zions Bancorporation recently reshuffled its technology and operations leadership by appointing Margaret Mayer as CIO and Ken Collins as Chief Transformation and Operations Officer, following the departure of former CTO Jennifer Smith. This change is seen as incremental but could influence the bank's digital strategy and cost efficiency goals, especially in light of its recent $500 million senior notes issuance. While technology upgrades are a focus, investors are advised to consider the bank's significant commercial real estate exposure and varying fair value estimates.

feed.title: Peraso 60 GHz mmWave Technology Selected for Next-Generation Drone Identification System for Military Applications
feed.summary: Peraso Inc. announced that its 60 GHz millimeter-wave (mmWave) technology has been chosen by Israeli defense contractor InTACT for a new drone Identification Friend or Foe (IFF) system. This system is designed for military applications to securely identify friendly drones in contested electronic warfare environments, leveraging Peraso's directional communication links to minimize detection and interception. The collaboration aims to prevent friendly fire incidents and enhance battlefield coordination by differentiating between allied and hostile aerial platforms.

feed.title: EagleNXT Announces Strategic Investment in Leading Israeli Precision Loitering Munition Innovator
feed.summary: EagleNXT, operating as AgEagle Aerial Systems Inc., has announced a strategic investment in Aerodrome Group Ltd., an Israeli developer of precision loitering munitions. This investment aims to enhance EagleNXT’s capabilities in autonomy and precision strike technologies, aligning with its mission to provide advanced uncrewed systems for defense, public safety, agriculture, and commercial sectors. The agreement also includes a reserved right for EagleNXT to establish a U.S.-based joint venture, subject to mutual agreement and regulatory approvals.

feed.title: YEXT: Share Repurchase Plan And Cancelled Buyout Will Support Future Upside Potential
feed.summary: Yext's fair value estimate remains at $8.88, with only minor adjustments to valuation inputs. Key developments include a new partnership with AdCellerant, authorization of a share buyback plan of up to US$180 million, and the cancellation of a proposed management buyout at US$9 per share. These actions, particularly the share repurchase, are expected to support future upside potential for the stock.

feed.title: Marvell Earnings: Take the Hint—Emphatic Long-Term Guidance Is Credible and Worth Buying In
feed.summary: Marvell Technology reported strong fiscal fourth-quarter results and provided an optimistic, raised outlook for fiscal 2027 and 2028, projecting $11 billion and $15 billion in sales, respectively. Morningstar views this guidance as credible, driven by Marvell's position as a significant beneficiary of data center and AI spending, especially with its diversified portfolio in networking, optical, and custom AI chips. Consequently, Morningstar raised its fair value estimate for Marvell stock to $130 from $120, seeing significant upside despite a post-earnings share pop.

feed.title: CPI Card Group Announces Strong Q4 Results, 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: CPI Card Group reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, with record Q4 revenue and increased annual revenue driven by acquisitions and demand for contactless cards. The company announced a strategic realignment into three operating segments and provided an initial 2026 outlook expecting high single-digit revenue growth. Despite a "Neutral" rating from TipRanks' AI Analyst due to valuation and profitability concerns, the company is investing in technology to strengthen its competitive position.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Raises Stock Holdings in Udemy, Inc. $UDMY
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in Udemy, Inc. (NASDAQ:UDMY) by 3.8% in the third quarter of 2025, now holding over 11.89 million shares valued at approximately $83.4 million. Other institutional investors also boosted their positions, contributing to hedge funds and institutions owning nearly 80% of the company's stock. Despite mixed analyst ratings and a "Hold" consensus, Udemy beat its Q3 EPS estimates, though revenue declined year-over-year.

feed.title: Cross Country Healthcare, Inc. (NASDAQ:CCRN) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Cross Country Healthcare, Inc. (NASDAQ:CCRN) released its Q4 2025 earnings call transcript, reporting missed earnings expectations with an EPS of $-2.56476 against an expectation of $0.03. CEO Kevin Clark outlined a strategy for renewed growth, focusing on operational rigor, technology-powered solutions like Intellify and Xperience, and disciplined capital allocation, aiming for revenue run rate north of $1 billion and adjusted EBITDA margins of 4% to 5% by the end of 2026. The company plans to expand its market share, leverage its strong balance sheet for strategic investments including potential accretive acquisitions in home-based staffing and locums, and continue to optimize costs by expanding its India-based center of excellence and adopting AI.

feed.title: SAP SE Stock Forecast | Q4 Backlog 25% Drives 14–16% Slide
feed.summary: SAP SE shares dropped 14-16% on January 29, 2026, after its Q4 2025 cloud backlog growth of 25% fell slightly short of analyst expectations of 26%. Despite this, the company reported a 31% increase in non-IFRS operating profit and a near doubling of free cash flow. Third-party analysts have revised price targets downwards, citing the cloud backlog miss, while maintaining largely positive outlooks due to SAP's strong fundamentals and resilience to AI substitution risk.

feed.title: Cardlytics, Inc. (NASDAQ:CDLX) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Cardlytics, Inc. reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, missing EPS expectations. The company highlighted a strategic reset towards self-sustainability, focusing on deepening bank partnerships, integrating new publishers, and leveraging advanced algorithms for advertisers, despite facing near-term pressure from the conclusion of its Bank of America relationship and content restrictions. Cardlytics anticipates sequential growth from Q1 2026 onwards by optimizing its platform and expanding its U.K. business.

feed.title: Victory Capital Management Inc. Sells 24,319 Shares of Littelfuse, Inc. $LFUS
feed.summary: Victory Capital Management Inc. has reduced its stake in Littelfuse, Inc. by 8.3%, selling 24,319 shares and now owning 267,558 shares valued at approximately $69.3 million. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own about 96.14% of LFUS, and Wall Street maintains a "Buy" rating with an average target price of $364. Littelfuse recently exceeded quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and issued positive Q1 2026 guidance, though company insiders have been net sellers of shares.

feed.title: Ooma, Inc. (NYSE:OOMA) Q4 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Ooma, Inc. (NYSE: OOMA) announced strong Q4 2026 financial results, including solid revenue growth and record adjusted EBITDA of $11.5 million, reaching 15% of revenue. The company successfully integrated acquisitions of FluentStream and Phone.com, contributing significantly to revenue, and saw a record quarter for AirDial installations. Ooma introduced new AI solutions for its Ooma Office platform and is optimistic about continued growth in fiscal 2027, driven by market tailwinds, expanding partnerships, and further potential acquisitions.

feed.title: Smith Micro Software, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMSI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Smith Micro Software, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMSI) held its Q4 2025 earnings call, reporting an EPS of $-0.08 against an expectation of $-0.07. The company highlighted strategic progress in its SafePath OS solutions for kids and seniors, cost rationalization efforts, and an anticipated return to non-GAAP profitability in Q2 2026. Founder Bill Smith also announced his transition from CEO to Executive Chairman, with Tim Huffmyer succeeding him as President and CEO, and additional funding provided by the Smiths.

feed.title: VTI ETF Adds $1B in Net Flows — Daily Snapshot, 3/6/26
feed.summary: The Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF (VTI) recently garnered $1 billion in net inflows over five days, indicating strong investor interest in broad U.S. equity exposure. Despite a slight dip of 1.43% during this period, VTI remains up 0.87% year-to-date and holds 3,468 stocks with NVIDIA, Apple, and Microsoft as its top positions. According to TipRanks' ETF analyst consensus, VTI is rated a Moderate Buy with an implied upside of 23%.

feed.title: Stratasys Ltd. (NASDAQ:SSYS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Stratasys Ltd. (NASDAQ:SSYS) reported Q4 2025 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $0.07. The company maintained operational discipline and delivered positive cash flow, focusing on high-value target areas like aerospace and defense, automotive tooling, dental, and medical. Despite a challenging market, Stratasys projects a return to growth in 2026 with an expected revenue range of $565 million to $575 million, driven by strategic partnerships, product innovation, and expanding adoption of additive manufacturing in critical applications.

feed.title: Nomura Adjusts Baidu Price Target to $186 From $196, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Nomura has lowered its price target for Baidu (BIDU) to $186 from $196, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a recent period of re-evaluations by other analysts, some of whom have also reduced their price targets or maintained sell ratings on Baidu, citing various market factors and company performance. Baidu Inc. is primarily an internet search provider and operates through Baidu Core and iQIYI segments, focusing on AI initiatives, mobile ecosystem, and online entertainment.

feed.title: U.S.-Iran war exposes big market concentration risk. It isn't in S&P 500 stocks
feed.summary: The U.S.-Iran conflict has highlighted a significant concentration risk in emerging markets, particularly within Asia, where ETFs are heavily weighted towards tech-dependent economies like China and South Korea. This dependence on energy-intensive tech manufacturing has led to extreme volatility in these markets due to rising oil prices. While not a reason to abandon emerging markets, investors are advised to adopt a "barbell approach," balancing Asian exposure with investments in Latin America, which could benefit from commodity links and political reforms.

feed.title: OmniAb, Inc. (NASDAQ:OABI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: OmniAb, Inc. reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, highlighting a strategic shift towards innovative technologies and operational efficiency. The company saw growth in active partners and programs, introduced new platforms like OmniUltra and xPloration, and provided revenue guidance for 2026. Management discussed their trajectory towards being cash flow positive, driven by a maturing portfolio and disciplined cost control.

feed.title: Ituran (ITRN) Q4 EPS Jumps 10% to $0.77, Revenue Hits $93.5M
feed.summary: Ituran (ITRN) reported a strong Q4 2025, with earnings per share jumping 10% to $0.77 and revenue climbing 13% to $93.5 million. The company's net income was $15.3 million, with an EBITDA of $25.3 million. This performance highlights continued operational momentum in its location-based services and telematics business, setting a positive benchmark for Q1 2026.

feed.title: Ituran Location and Control Ltd. (NASDAQ:ITRN) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Ituran Location and Control Ltd. (NASDAQ:ITRN) reported record Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with revenues up 13% to nearly $94 million and subscriber revenue up 15%. The company achieved a record EBITDA exceeding $100 million for the first time and generated $29.4 million in cash flow, leading to a special dividend and increased share buyback. ITRN also highlighted new initiatives like the IturanMob smart-mobility platform, Credit Carbon for EV drivers, and monetization of its extensive big data capabilities for future growth.

feed.title: Stifel cuts Guidewire stock price target on multiple contraction
feed.summary: Stifel lowered its price target for Guidewire Software Inc. to $250 from $300, citing software multiple contraction, but maintained a Buy rating. Despite the reduced target, Guidewire's stock has performed well recently, and the company reported strong second-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings, beating expectations and raising full-year guidance. Other analysts have also adjusted price targets, with RBC Capital lowering its target while Citizens and Needham reiterated their ratings.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald reiterates Better Home stock rating on ChatGPT deal
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald reiterated an Overweight stock rating and $40 price target for Better Home & Finance Holding (NASDAQ:BETR) after the company announced a partnership to integrate its mortgage origination platform, Tinman, with ChatGPT enterprise licenses. The firm views this as a significant new distribution channel that the market may be underestimating, expecting a material impact on the company’s profit and loss. Better Home has also recently launched an AI-powered mortgage approval tool, secured a $500 million credit line, and seen its Tinman platform drive substantial efficiency gains for partners.

feed.title: Wolfspeed Introduces Industry's First Commercially Available 10,000 V Silicon Carbide Power MOSFET
feed.summary: Wolfspeed has announced the introduction of the industry's first commercially available 10,000 V Silicon Carbide Power MOSFET. This new technology is expected to enable higher power density, efficiency, and reliability in critical applications such as electric vehicle charging and grid infrastructure. The product represents a significant advance in power semiconductor technology.

feed.title: Panama Partner Issues Purchase Order for DFR-X Drone System as Wrap Expands Non-Lethal Response Capabilities in the Region
feed.summary: Wrap Technologies, Inc. announced its expansion into Panama through an exclusive partnership with Servicios Tácticos de Seguridad S.A. (STS). The agreement includes an initial purchase order for Wrap's DFR-X™ drone system and BolaWrap devices, aiming to introduce integrated non-lethal response technologies and training platforms to enhance public safety operations in Panama. This strategic collaboration is expected to address evolving security challenges in the region, particularly in a key logistics and maritime hub.

feed.title: Avista Corporation (AVA) Increases Annual Dividend to $1.97 Per Share
feed.summary: Avista Corporation (AVA) has increased its annual dividend to $1.97 per share, marking its 24th consecutive year of dividend increases. The company announced Q4 2025 results and issued 2026 EPS guidance, along with outlining significant capital expenditure plans for the coming years. Avista, headquartered in Spokane, Washington, is recognized as an undervalued utility stock.

feed.title: TriplePoint Venture Growth BDC Corp. (NYSE:TPVG) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: TriplePoint Venture Growth BDC (TPVG) held its Q4 2025 earnings call, reporting an EPS of $0.25, slightly below expectations of $0.26. The company highlighted significant progress in 2025, including increased investment portfolio size, record origination activity of $508 million in new debt commitments, and strategic rotation into AI-focused and national priority sectors. Management emphasized strengthening the balance sheet, resolving credit situations, and growing NAV, while also addressing concerns about software exposure amidst AI disruption and discussing future M&A and IPO prospects.

feed.title: AI drug discovery firm Shuttle Pharma raises $3.5M in public offering
feed.summary: Shuttle Pharmaceuticals announced a public offering to issue 2,238,800 shares of common stock and pre-funded warrants for 4,761,200 shares, aiming to raise approximately $3.5 million. The funds will be used for marketing efforts (up to $1.5 million) and general corporate purposes, including working capital. The offering is expected to close around March 9, 2026, with E.F. Hutton & Co. acting as the exclusive placement agent.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Has $78.64 Million Stock Holdings in ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. $ADTN
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. increased its stake in ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. by 2.7% during the third quarter, now owning 8,383,305 shares valued at approximately $78.64 million, representing 10.48% of the company. Analyst sentiment for ADTRAN is mixed, with three "Buy" ratings, two "Hold" ratings, and one "Sell" rating, resulting in a consensus "Hold" with an average price target of $15.33. The company recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates but faces an expected full-year negative EPS.

feed.title: Bilibili Inc. (NASDAQ:BILI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Bilibili Inc. announced strong Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results, achieving its first full year of GAAP profitability with RMB 1.2 billion net profit on RMB 30.3 billion revenue. The company saw accelerating user growth, increased engagement, and a 27% year-over-year rise in advertising revenue in Q4, driven by a maturing user base and AI-powered efficiencies. Bilibili plans to continue investing in AI to enhance content creation, improve recommendation efficiency, and solidify its position as a leading platform for high-quality content and community for China's young audience.

feed.title: China's Semiconductor Makers Unite In Call To 'Build China's ASML'
feed.summary: Chinese semiconductor executives are advocating for a national effort to develop a homegrown alternative to ASML Holding, particularly in advanced chip manufacturing tools, due to increasing U.S. restrictions. They emphasize the need to consolidate China's fragmented chip sector, coordinate resources, and build a domestic EUV ecosystem by 2030. Meanwhile, ASML is expanding into advanced packaging solutions for AI chips and integrating AI into its operations.

feed.title: Key facts: CLARITY Act may boost XRP; Tokyo startup launches platform; $1.26B in XRP ETF inflows
feed.summary: The CLARITY Act could potentially increase XRP's price by reducing regulatory obstacles for institutional investors, similar to a previous rally after an SEC settlement. A Tokyo fintech startup has launched a global trade finance platform on the XRP Ledger, aiming to improve settlement efficiency. Despite $1.26 billion in net inflows to the XRP ETF sector, major XRP ETFs did not report new capital on March 4.

feed.title: Wipro appoints Laura Marie Miller to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Wipro Limited has announced the appointment of Laura Marie Miller to its Board of Directors for a five-year term, effective April 1, 2026, pending shareholder approval. Miller brings over two decades of global leadership experience in digital and AI strategy, having held senior roles at Macy’s, InterContinental Hotels Group, and First Data. Rishad Premji highlighted her strategic leadership and expertise in technology governance as valuable assets to the board.

feed.title: Wipro names Laura Marie Miller to its Board of Directors
feed.summary: Wipro Limited has announced the appointment of Laura Marie Miller to its Board of Directors for a five-year term starting April 1, 2026. Miller brings over twenty years of executive leadership experience in guiding global organizations through transformation, particularly in technology and AI-led disruption. She has held senior leadership roles at Macy's, InterContinental Hotels Group, and First Data, and has substantial public company board experience, currently serving as Non-Executive Director at NCR Voyix and Ahold Delhaize.

feed.title: Stockholder vote on AI-focused BlockchAIn business combination March 13
feed.summary: Signing Day Sports (SGN) will hold a special stockholder meeting on March 13, 2026, to vote on its proposed business combination with BlockchAIn Digital Infrastructure. If approved, BlockchAIn Inc. is expected to trade on NYSE American under the ticker AIB. The SEC declared the registration statement effective on January 30, 2026, and proxy materials have been distributed to stockholders of record as of January 20, 2026.

feed.title: Signing Day Sports (NYSE American: SGN) sets March 13 vote on BlockchAIn deal
feed.summary: Signing Day Sports (NYSE American: SGN) has scheduled a special stockholder meeting for March 13, 2026, to vote on its proposed business combination with BlockchAIn Digital Infrastructure, Inc. and its affiliates. If approved, BlockchAIn Inc. shares are expected to trade on NYSE American under the ticker “AIB,” with both Signing Day Sports and BlockchAIn LLC becoming wholly-owned subsidiaries of BlockchAIn Inc. BlockchAIn LLC brings a profitable 40 MW data center operation to the merger, which generated approximately $22.9 million in revenue and $5.7 million in net income in 2024.

feed.title: VEON targets Pakistan's insurance gap with TPL digital deal
feed.summary: VEON, through its subsidiary Jazz International Holding, is set to acquire a controlling stake in TPL Insurance for approximately PKR 4.15 billion (USD 14.6 million), aiming to expand its digital financial services in Pakistan. This acquisition will integrate TPL Insurance’s offerings into VEON's existing digital ecosystem, including JazzCash and Mobilink Bank, to enhance financial inclusion and address the significant under-insurance gap in Pakistan. The transaction is expected to close by mid-2026, pending regulatory approvals from the Competition Commission of Pakistan.

feed.title: Gaotu Techedu Inc. (NYSE:GOTU) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Gaotu Techedu Inc. (NYSE:GOTU) published its Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 earnings transcript, reporting a 21.4% year-over-year revenue increase to RMB 1.7 billion for Q4 and a 35% revenue growth for the full year 2025. The company emphasized its strategic focus on profitable growth, AI integration, and the continued expansion and profitability of its offline learning centers. Gaotu Techedu exceeded earnings expectations with reported EPS of $-0.00726 against an expected $-0.0112, driven by operational efficiency and a refined business model.

feed.title: The Show Never Stops in WWE® 2K26 King of Kings Edition Attitude Era Edition , and Monday Night War Edition Available Now Worldwide
feed.summary: 2K has announced the immediate worldwide availability of the King of Kings, Attitude Era, and Monday Night War Editions of WWE® 2K26 for PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch™ 2, and PC. This latest installment of the WWE video game franchise features significant improvements across all game modes, including four new match types, a roster of over 400 characters, and expanded customization options. The Standard Edition, featuring CM Punk, will be released on March 13, 2026.

feed.title: Verizon to speak at Deutsche Bank Media, Internet & Telecom Conference on March 10
feed.summary: Verizon's Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Tony Skiadas, is scheduled to speak at the Deutsche Bank Media, Internet & Telecom Conference on March 10 at 8:00 a.m. ET. The session will be webcast and accessible via Verizon's Investor Relations website. Verizon, a leading communications technology company, generated $138.2 billion in revenues in 2025.

feed.title: Zoom, NextEra Energy And An Energy Stock: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades" featured analyses of Flex LNG, NextEra Energy, and Zoom Communications. Flex LNG (NYSE: FLNG) was highlighted for its 10% yield despite missing Q4 earnings estimates, while NextEra Energy (NYSE: NEE) received a "Buy" rating and increased price target from UBS. Zoom Communications (NASDAQ: ZM) reported mixed fourth-quarter results, with adjusted EPS missing estimates but revenue surpassing forecasts.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark Appoints Francesco Tinto as Chief Information & GBS Officer
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ: KMB) announced the appointment of Francesco Tinto as Chief Information & Global Business Services (GBS) Officer, effective March 9, 2026. Tinto will report to Russ Torres and will lead the company's Information Technology and GBS organizations. He brings over 30 years of technology leadership, previously serving at Advantage Solutions, Walgreens Boots Alliance, Kraft Heinz, and Procter & Gamble.

feed.title: Y.D. More Investments Ltd Acquires 5,975 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: Y.D. More Investments Ltd increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 25% in the third quarter, acquiring 5,975 additional shares to bring its total holdings to 29,848 shares valued at approximately $7.256 million. The article also highlights significant insider selling, with over 2 million shares sold for approximately $108.7 million in the past 90 days, though insiders still own 11.64% of the stock. Alphabet also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.21 per share.

feed.title: The AI-Enabled Scientist: Less Artisan, More Architect
feed.summary: AI is transforming scientific experimentation, shifting the scientist's role from hands-on artisan to strategic architect. AI handles routine tasks like generating experimental protocols, drawing from vast knowledge bases, while humans focus on creative insights, complex problem-solving, and ethical oversight. The future demands scientists who can effectively leverage and critically validate AI tools, fostering a new era of accelerated research driven by human-AI collaboration.

feed.title: How Axon’s AI-Driven Q4 Results and 2026 Outlook Could Reshape Axon Enterprise (AXON) Investors
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise reported strong Q4 2025 results with revenue rising to US$796.72 million, driven by its shift to an AI- and software-centric public safety platform, though net income declined significantly. The company issued 2026 guidance forecasting 27% to 30% year-over-year revenue growth, reinforcing the investment narrative that high-margin software and AI tools are key catalysts. This outlook underscores Axon's shift from hardware to recurring revenue services, even as it navigates margin pressures and investor concerns.

feed.title: Heron Bay Capital Management Purchases Shares of 16,860 Adobe Inc. $ADBE
feed.summary: Heron Bay Capital Management recently initiated a new position in Adobe Inc. (ADBE), acquiring 16,860 shares valued at approximately $5.95 million. This follows other institutional investors increasing their stakes, bringing combined institutional ownership to 81.79%. Concurrently, Adobe’s CFO sold shares, reducing his insider position, while the company reported strong financial results beating quarterly estimates and issued positive guidance for Q1 and FY 2026, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating among analysts.

feed.title: US Premarket Movers: Gap, Marvell, Nutex Health, Nvidia, Samsara
feed.summary: US stock futures are down, with the S&P 500 Index futures falling 0.6% as oil prices rise, increasing inflation concerns related to the Middle East conflict. Traders are also anticipating the release of Friday's jobs report. The article lists Gap, Marvell, Nutex Health, Nvidia, and Samsara as major premarket movers.

feed.title: Wilson Asset Management International PTY Ltd. Invests $5.70 Million in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Wilson Asset Management International PTY Ltd. has initiated a new position in Microsoft Corporation ($MSFT) by purchasing 11,000 shares valued at approximately $5.70 million during the third quarter. This investment makes Microsoft its 27th largest holding, accounting for about 1.4% of the fund's portfolio. Several other institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes in Microsoft, with the company showing strong financial performance and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts despite some recent challenges.

feed.title: Western Wealth Management LLC Increases Stake in Microsoft Corporation $MSFT
feed.summary: Western Wealth Management LLC has increased its stake in Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) by 2.8% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 82,491 shares valued at $42.7 million. This makes Microsoft its 7th largest holding, representing about 2.3% of its investment portfolio. Other institutional investors and hedge funds have also significantly modified their positions in Microsoft.

feed.title: Left Brain Wealth Management LLC Invests $732,000 in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC $STX
feed.summary: Left Brain Wealth Management LLC has acquired a new stake of 3,100 shares, valued at $732,000, in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC during the third quarter. This move is part of broader institutional investment activity, with other major firms like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp also adjusting their significant holdings in the data storage provider. The article highlights both positive and negative sentiments surrounding Seagate, including its new HAMR platform and analyst target raises, alongside concerns about insider selling, sector risks, and valuation.

feed.title: Heron Bay Capital Management Has $8.23 Million Position in MSCI Inc $MSCI
feed.summary: Heron Bay Capital Management significantly increased its stake in MSCI Inc. by 24.7% in Q3, now holding 14,507 shares valued at $8.23 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $671.78. MSCI recently beat quarterly earnings expectations and raised its quarterly dividend, while CEO Henry Fernandez bought shares and the CFO sold some.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks founder Nir Zuk unveils 'AI-native' cybersecurity platform Cylake
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks founder Nir Zuk has launched Cylake, an "AI-native" cybersecurity platform designed to replace on-premises or private cloud security solutions for large enterprises. Cylake aims to provide end-to-end security with hardware and software components, emphasizing operational sovereignty and countering AI-led threats using AI itself. Zuk is joined by cybersecurity veterans Ehud Shamir (co-founder of SentinelOne) and Wilson Xu (former EVP of engineering at Palo Alto), with the venture backed by Greylock.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Wealthfront Corporation (WLTH), Epam Systems (EPAM) and ServiceTitan, Inc. Class A (TTAN)
feed.summary: This article highlights bullish sentiments from financial analysts towards three technology companies: Wealthfront Corporation (WLTH), Epam Systems (EPAM), and ServiceTitan, Inc. Class A (TTAN). Wells Fargo analysts Robert P. Ryan and Jason Kupferberg maintained Buy ratings for Wealthfront and Epam respectively, while Piper Sandler's Billy Fitzsimmons maintained a Buy rating for ServiceTitan. All three companies are projected to have significant upside according to analyst consensus price targets.

feed.title: Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) Upgraded at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) from a "strong sell" rating to a "hold" rating. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price targets for the company, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $100.13. The article also details recent insider stock sales and institutional investor activity regarding Crown Castle shares.

feed.title: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (CRDO) Maintained at Overweight by JPMorgan
feed.summary: JPMorgan analyst Joseph Cardoso reiterated an Overweight rating for Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (CRDO), citing that the recent selloff is excessive and competitive risks are overstated. Needham also maintained a Buy rating and a $220 price target, revising revenue forecasts upward after CRDO's strong preliminary Q3 revenue update and projected continued growth. Credo, a fabless semiconductor provider, specializes in high-speed connectivity solutions for data centers and AI infrastructure, with significant growth expected in fiscal 2026 and beyond.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Zscaler: “I Would Not Sell It Here”
feed.summary: Jim Cramer advised a caller not to sell Zscaler (NASDAQ: ZS) immediately but suggested lightening their position due to owning too many similar cybersecurity stocks (CrowdStrike, Rubrik, Cloudflare). Cramer believes Zscaler could see a bounce, after which the investor should consider selling some shares to reduce portfolio pain. The article also highlights Zscaler's record revenues and its cloud-based security offerings.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Zscaler: "I Would Not Sell It Here"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed Zscaler (ZS) on a call, advising a caller with multiple cybersecurity holdings not to sell ZS at its current price but to consider lightening their position during a bounce due to overexposure. Cramer emphasized the importance of not having too many similar stocks to avoid potential financial pain. The article also mentions Zscaler's cloud-based security platform and briefly promotes other AI stock opportunities.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says "Maybe There's a Recognition That Amazon Web Services Is Not Going to Be Wiped Out by Anthropic"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed Amazon's stock performance, noting its recent rally after a significant post-earnings decline. He attributes some of this recovery to the recognition that Amazon Web Services (AWS) is unlikely to be overthrown by Anthropic. Cramer also addressed Amazon's massive CapEx forecast of $200 billion for the year, which initially overshadowed positive Q4 results, expressing his faith in CEO Andy Jassy's ability to navigate these investments despite short-term market reactions.

feed.title: Can AI Initiatives & Improving Margins Drive Cognex Shares in 2026?
feed.summary: Cognex (CGNX) is focusing on AI-enabled industrial machine vision and cost-cutting to improve profitability and cash generation, targeting 25% run-rate adjusted EBITDA by the end of 2026. Despite a recent surge in stock performance and a "Strong Buy" Zacks Rank, investors are questioning if its premium valuation is justified given its mixed Style Scores and higher P/E multiple compared to peers. The company anticipates mid to high-single-digit organic revenue growth in 2026, spread across various verticals, and maintains a strong balance sheet to support continued investment and shareholder returns.

feed.title: Uber Shares Sold by Investment Firm
feed.summary: JT Stratford LLC, an institutional investor, has significantly reduced its stake in Uber Technologies, Inc. by selling 33,521 shares in the third quarter of 2026, lowering its holdings to 7,242 shares. This 82.2% reduction, valuing their remaining stake at $709,000, signals investor caution regarding Uber's stock performance amidst ongoing challenges like litigation and regulatory issues. The move highlights continued uncertainty about Uber's long-term prospects among major institutional investors.

feed.title: Kroger CEO Greg Foran Talks Early Priorities During Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Kroger CEO Greg Foran outlined his initial priorities for the company during the Q4 earnings call, focusing on internal improvements and streamlining existing operations rather than reinventing the business. Foran emphasized enhancing the customer experience both in-store and online, improving execution, and funding these initiatives through cost savings in areas like sourcing and technology. The company reported strong Q4 sales of $34.7 billion and significant growth in e-commerce, which is expected to become profitable in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: Heron Bay Capital Management Takes Position in Enphase Energy, Inc. $ENPH
feed.summary: Heron Bay Capital Management has initiated a new position in Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH), acquiring over 29,000 shares worth $1.039 million in Q3. The company shows positive operational momentum with a Q4 earnings beat and an expanded Vistra partnership for its IQ Batteries, yet it faces legal challenges from class-action lawsuits regarding an April–October 2025 period. Analysts currently rate Enphase as a "Hold" with a consensus price target of $43.28; despite insider sales, institutional investors own approximately 72.12% of the shares.

feed.title: Astera Labs Trades at a Premium Valuation: Hold or Fold the Stock?
feed.summary: Astera Labs (ALAB) is currently trading at a premium valuation with a Value Score of F and a Price/Sales ratio significantly higher than its sector. Despite underperforming the broader Zacks Computer & Technology sector recently due to macroeconomic challenges and stiff competition, the company is expected to benefit from expanding its product portfolio for AI infrastructure and connectivity solutions, projecting a 10x market opportunity increase. While facing strong competition from peers like Marvell Technology and Broadcom, Astera Labs shows strong Q1 guidance for 2026, though its stretched valuation and competitive landscape suggest a "Hold" recommendation.

feed.title: (BEKE) Movement Within Algorithmic Entry Frameworks
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily discusses the algorithmic entry frameworks for Ke Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: BEKE). It identifies a near-term neutral sentiment suggesting a pause in mid and long-term weakness, with resistance being tested. The analysis provides institutional trading strategies including long, breakout, and short positions, along with multi-timeframe signal analysis indicating support and resistance levels.

feed.title: Analog Devices Stock: Quiet Chip Giant Riding the AI Wave
feed.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) is gaining attention as a "quiet chip powerhouse" supplying essential analog, mixed-signal, and power chips for AI data centers, EVs, and industrial machines. While not a pure GPU play like Nvidia, ADI's technology is critical for the real-world functionality of AI servers and edge devices, as well as EV powertrains and industrial automation. The company is seen as a "picks-and-shovels" investment benefiting from megatrends like AI infrastructure, EV transition, and industrial reshoring, offering a blend of dividend stability and growth potential.

feed.title: INVESTOR NOTICE: Enphase Energy, Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Class Action Lawsuit – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP announces a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) for alleged violations of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit claims Enphase overstated its ability to manage inventory and mitigate effects from the 25D Credit termination, leading to a stock price drop after their Q3 2025 financial results. Investors who suffered substantial losses have until April 20, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Integrity Advisory Solutions LLC Makes New $689,000 Investment in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: Integrity Advisory Solutions LLC has made a new investment of $689,000 in International Business Machines Corporation (IBM), acquiring 2,441 shares in the third quarter. This comes as IBM reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with EPS of $4.52 and revenue up 12.2% year-over-year, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.68. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of IBM's stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $320.87.

feed.title: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Rating Increased to Strong-Buy at Sanford C. Bernstein
feed.summary: Sanford C. Bernstein has upgraded Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) to a "strong-buy" rating, with other analysts like JPMorgan Chase & Co. and Guggenheim also raising price targets and giving "overweight" or "buy" ratings. Despite mixed analyst opinions, the stock holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $1,006.91. Recent positive developments include Moody’s upgrading Equinix’s senior unsecured rating to Baa1 with a stable outlook, and the company raising its quarterly dividend, though insider selling by executives has also been reported.

feed.title: AIRO Group CEO and CFO to brief investors at Cantor 2026 conference
feed.summary: AIRO Group Holdings, Inc. announced that its CEO, Captain Joe Burns, CFO, Mariya Pylypiv, and Executive Chairman, Dr. Chirinjeev Kathuria, will present at the 2026 Cantor Global Technology & Industrial Growth Conference on March 11, 2026. They will also host investor meetings. A live webcast will be available through the Company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Roth Capital Lowers PT on Playtika Holding (PLTK), Keeps a Hold Rating
feed.summary: Roth Capital has reduced its price target on Playtika Holding Corp. (PLTK) from $4 to $3, while maintaining a Hold rating. The decision follows the company's fiscal Q4 2025 earnings report, with the analyst anticipating another year of no growth in 2026, despite positive margin expansion and strong Q4 revenue performance. Playtika, a mobile game developer, exceeded revenue estimates in Q4, driven by SuperPlay and direct-to-consumer sales, and has provided revenue guidance for fiscal 2026.

feed.title: Technical Reactions to BCML Trends in Macro Strategies
feed.summary: The article analyzes Baycom Corp (NASDAQ: BCML) using AI models, identifying weak near-term sentiment but strong long-term potential. It highlights a significant 24.7:1 risk-reward setup targeting a 7.0% gain. Three distinct trading strategies—Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—are provided for different risk profiles.

feed.title: Wipro appoints global tech veteran Laura Marie Miller to board for five-year term
feed.summary: Wipro Limited has announced the appointment of Laura Marie Miller to its Board of Directors for a five-year term, effective April 1, 2026, pending shareholder approval. Miller brings over two decades of executive leadership experience, having guided global organizations through transformation and performance improvement, with a focus on technology-led and AI-driven change. She has held senior roles at Macy's, InterContinental Hotels Group, and First Data, and has significant public company board experience with EVO Payments, LGI Homes, NCR Voyix, and Ahold Delhaize.

feed.title: Pitcairn Co. Sells 2,654 Shares of Intuit Inc. $INTU
feed.summary: Pitcairn Co. reduced its stake in Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) by 28.2% in Q3, selling 2,654 shares and retaining 6,753 shares valued at approximately $4.61 million. This comes as Intuit reported strong Q2 FY2026 earnings, beating estimates and raising guidance, partly due to a new AI partnership with Anthropic. Despite some analyst price target adjustments, the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating, although insiders have sold a significant number of shares recently.

feed.title: Pitcairn Co. Has $3.81 Million Stock Holdings in eBay Inc. $EBAY
feed.summary: Pitcairn Co. has reduced its stake in eBay Inc. by 23.7%, now holding 41,897 shares valued at $3.81 million. Despite this, eBay exceeded quarterly EPS estimates, saw a 15% revenue increase year-over-year, and boosted its quarterly dividend to $0.31 per share. Analysts a consensus "Hold" rating with a target price of $97.75 for the stock.

feed.title: (BCE) as a Liquidity Pulse for Institutional Tactics
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed analysis of BCE Inc. (NYSE: BCE), highlighting strong near-term sentiment and an exceptional risk-reward short setup. feed.title: Turkcell Posts 10.7% Revenue Growth in Hyperinflation-Adjusted 2025 Results
feed.summary: Turkcell (TKC) announced its full-year 2025 results, reporting a 10.7% year-on-year revenue increase to TRY 241.5 billion, adjusted for hyperinflation. The company re-segmented its revenue for clearer reporting across Turkcell Türkiye, Techfin, and Other units, demonstrating continued growth despite high inflation. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates TKC as an "Outperform" due to strong financial performance and strategic achievements in 5G and digital services.

feed.title: Integrated Quantitative Investments LLC Trims Stock Position in Thermon Group Holdings, Inc. $THR
feed.summary: Integrated Quantitative Investments LLC significantly reduced its stake in Thermon Group Holdings, Inc. by 67.2% in Q3, now holding 12,100 shares valued at $323,000. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own 99.76% of the company's stock. Thermon Group has shown strong financial performance, beating quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and receiving a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $57.00.

feed.title: Barclays downgrades Certara stock rating on turnaround concerns
feed.summary: Barclays has downgraded Certara Inc. (NASDAQ:CERT) to Equalweight from Overweight, setting an $8.00 price target due to concerns about the extent of investment needed for the company's turnaround and potential impacts on margins. Analyst Luke Sergott noted that the business requires more significant investment across its organization to accelerate core growth than initially expected, making a durable valuation unlock some time away. This comes after Certara reported mixed Q4 2025 earnings and faced other analyst downgrades and price target reductions from Craig-Hallum, TD Cowen, and Leerink Partners.

feed.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights SPY, DIA, QQQ, WCLD, XTL, RSPC, IHF and XOP
feed.summary: The Zacks Analyst Blog highlights several ETFs, including SPY, DIA, QQQ, WCLD, XTL, RSPC, IHF, and XOP, noting their performance amidst geopolitical tensions like the Iran conflict and broader market trends such as AI's impact. Despite initial market instability and shifting valuations, some sector-specific ETFs like cloud computing, telecom, healthcare providers, and oil & gas exploration have shown resilience and even gains over recent weeks. The article suggests these ETFs are holding steady or growing due to various factors like demand for AI infrastructure, defensive qualities, and elevated commodity prices.

feed.title: Waystar Advances AI Innovation with Google Cloud to Accelerate the Autonomous Revenue Cycle
feed.summary: Waystar has expanded its collaboration with Google Cloud to enhance its AI-powered platform and accelerate the autonomous revenue cycle in healthcare. This partnership integrates Google Cloud's Gemini models and data infrastructure to deploy advanced automation, leveraging Waystar's extensive financial and clinical data. The initiative aims to reduce denied claims and optimize the entire claims lifecycle, moving toward a self-learning revenue cycle with minimal human intervention.

feed.title: Equities Analysts Set Expectations for Crexendo Q1 Earnings
feed.summary: MarketBeat reports that Northland Securities has released its Q1 2026 EPS estimates for Crexendo (NASDAQ:CXDO), projecting $0.05 per share. The company previously surpassed consensus EPS estimates for its last reported quarter. Crexendo currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a target price of $9.17.

feed.title: WEBTOON Entertainment Elevates Yongsoo Kim to President to Accelerate Global Growth and Execution
feed.summary: WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. has appointed Yongsoo Kim as its President, who will also join the Board of Directors. In this role, Kim will lead global operations and focus on accelerating innovation and execution to drive growth, particularly after playing a key part in the company's successful 2024 IPO and a significant collaboration with Disney in 2025. Founder & CEO Junkoo Kim will now concentrate on long-term strategy, with President Kim managing global execution and CFO & COO David Lee maintaining his leadership position.

feed.title: Nano Labs Unveils iPollo ClawPC A1 Mini to Power OpenClaw AI Agent Ecosystem
feed.summary: Nano Labs has launched the iPollo ClawPC A1 Mini, a dedicated hardware device under its iPollo brand, designed to power the OpenClaw AI Agent System across various applications like gaming, content creation, and smart offices. The company plans to expand this initiative into a broader AI ecosystem, including iPollo Claw OS, a Skill Hub, and other OpenClaw-compatible hardware. This move reinforces Nano Labs' strategy to integrate AI software and hardware for "Web 4.0," according to the company.

feed.title: Cyngn’s new patent targets aging warehouse and factory vehicle fleets
feed.summary: Cyngn (Nasdaq: CYN) has been awarded its 24th U.S. patent, US-12530029-B2, for adaptive, real-time vehicle system identification in autonomous driving. This patent strengthens the company's universal autonomy capabilities by enabling vehicle-agnostic control, precise trajectory commands through gear-specific models, and proactive maintenance awareness. The technology positions Cyngn to help modernize aging industrial fleets through software-led transformation, offering significant operational advantages like vehicle-agnostic scalability and enhanced safety.

feed.title: Mini AI PC from Nano Labs runs open-source assistant platform
feed.summary: Nano Labs has launched the iPollo ClawPC A1 Mini, a dedicated hardware solution supporting the OpenClaw autonomous AI agent ecosystem. This compact device is designed for diverse uses, including gaming, professional content creation, and smart offices, emphasizing a localized AI experience. The company also plans to introduce iPollo Claw OS, a Skill Hub, and more OpenClaw-compatible hardware to build an integrated ecosystem.

feed.title: Nano Labs Launches iPollo ClawPC A1 Mini, a Dedicated Hardware Solution for the OpenClaw AI Agent Ecosystem
feed.summary: Nano Labs has launched the iPollo ClawPC A1 Mini, a dedicated hardware solution within its iPollo sub-brand designed to support the OpenClaw AI Agent System. This product aims to provide efficient, fluent, and localized AI experiences for various usage scenarios, including gaming and smart offices. The company plans to expand this ecosystem with iPollo Claw OS, a Skill Hub, and additional compatible hardware, striving to integrate AI into an independent and collaborative digital entity for the Web 4.0 Era.

feed.title: Citizens reiterates Nexxen stock rating on strong early 2026 results
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group reiterated its "Market Outperform" rating and $12.00 price target for Nexxen (NASDAQ:NEXN), citing strong performance in early 2026. Despite headwinds in late 2025, Nexxen achieved its best January and February in company history, driven by catalysts like its programmatic CTV Home Screen solution and mobile in-app investments. The firm emphasizes Nexxen's differentiated end-to-end platform and attractive risk/reward profile.

feed.title: Maris-Tech Prices $2 Million Registered Direct Offering to Bolster Liquidity
feed.summary: Maris-Tech Ltd. (MTEK) has priced a $2 million registered direct offering with an institutional investor, involving 1,605,136 ordinary shares or pre-funded warrants at $1.24 per share. The transaction, expected to close around March 9, 2026, aims to provide working capital and support the company's growth in video and AI edge-computing markets, despite modest shareholder dilution. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates MTEK as Neutral due to weak financial performance, ongoing losses, and balance-sheet leverage risk, despite solid revenue growth.

feed.title: Wearable Devices Ltd. Announces 1-for-3 Reverse Stock Split
feed.summary: Wearable Devices Ltd. (Nasdaq: WLDS, WLDSW) announced a one-for-three reverse stock split for its ordinary shares and tradable warrants, effective March 11, 2026. This strategic move aims to increase the per-share trading price to regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 and maintain its listing status. The reverse split will reduce the number of issued and outstanding ordinary shares and warrants proportionally, without altering shareholders' percentage ownership, and was approved by shareholders on February 19, 2026.

feed.title: Pitcairn Co. Invests $2.01 Million in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC $STX
feed.summary: Pitcairn Co. recently invested $2.01 million in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC by purchasing 8,517 shares in the third quarter, increasing institutional ownership to 92.87%. Seagate is advancing with its Mozaic 4+ HAMR platform and has surpassed quarterly EPS estimates, leading to raised price targets from analysts. However, the company faces headwinds including significant insider stock sales, a high valuation, and considerable leverage, which could pose risks if market demand weakens.

feed.title: BofA Cuts PT on Ambarella, Inc. (AMBA) to $72 From $85 - Here's Why
feed.summary: BofA has reduced its price target for Ambarella, Inc. (AMBA) to $72 from $85, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the shares. This adjustment comes despite in-line Q4 results and Q1 guidance, primarily due to new U.S. limits imposed on Arashi Vision (Insta360), Ambarella's largest customer, following a patent dispute. Although BofA lifted future sales and EPS estimates, the target cut reflects a balance between edge AI opportunities and slightly slower sales growth compared to peers.

feed.title: VRNS Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Varonis Systems, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is reminding investors of Varonis Systems, Inc. (VRNS) about a class action lawsuit for alleged securities fraud. The lawsuit claims Varonis made misleading statements about converting customers to its SaaS offering, leading to investor losses when the truth emerged. Investors who purchased securities between February 4, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm by March 9, 2026, to discuss their rights.

feed.title: Pitcairn Co. Sells 3,465 Shares of Intuitive Surgical, Inc. $ISRG
feed.summary: Pitcairn Co. reduced its stake in Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ: ISRG) by 24.5% in the third quarter, offloading 3,465 shares and now holding 10,667 shares valued at $4.77 million. Despite the company beating earnings expectations with $2.53 EPS and $2.87 billion revenue, insider selling has been notable, with 37,261 shares valued at approximately $19.7 million sold by executives in the last three months. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus, with a target price of $615.86, while acknowledging the stock's high valuation.

feed.title: Pitcairn Co. Has $2.42 Million Holdings in Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company $HPE
feed.summary: Pitcairn Co. reduced its stake in Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) by 34.3% in the third quarter, now holding 98,572 shares valued at $2.42 million. Insider selling has been substantial, with Jeremy Cox and Fidelma Russo selling significant shares, resulting in insiders owning only 0.44% of the stock. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $25.29.

feed.title: Canadian Solar Inc. (CSIQ): Why Analysts Are Split
feed.summary: Analysts are split on Canadian Solar Inc. (CSIQ), with a mix of buy, hold, and bearish recommendations and a median price target suggesting a 20.94% upside. The company's e-STORAGE subsidiary recently delivered its first grid-connected battery energy storage system in Japan, marking a significant milestone in its commitment to Japan's energy transition. Despite CSIQ's potential, the article suggests that some AI stocks offer greater promise for higher returns and limited downside risk.

feed.title: Veritone and The Washington Post Announce New Collaboration to Unlock Access to News Archives
feed.summary: Veritone and The Washington Post have announced a multi-year content licensing agreement to enable greater access to The Washington Post's news content globally. This collaboration will allow Veritone to represent The Washington Post's video content for licensing, including breaking news and archival footage, aiming to unlock new revenue streams and ensure wider distribution of trusted journalism. Veritone's content licensing solution seeks to make The Washington Post's extensive news archive more discoverable for partners and creators while preserving the integrity of its content and brand.

feed.title: Gravity Co. Calls March 27 AGM as 2025 Revenue Rises but Profit Eases
feed.summary: Gravity Co. (GRVY) announced its Annual General Meeting for March 27, 2026, to approve 2025 accounts and director appointments. While preliminary 2025 results show increased revenue and assets, operating and net income declined, indicating margin pressure. The company plans to reappoint most directors, signaling governance continuity amidst earnings volatility.

feed.title: VPG to Present at Investor Conferences in March 2026
feed.summary: Vishay Precision Group (NYSE: VPG) announced it will present at two investor conferences in March 2026. The company will participate in the Sidoti Virtual Conference on March 18-19, with a presentation scheduled for March 19, and the Roth 38th Annual Investor Conference on March 24. These engagements will provide opportunities for investors to learn more about VPG's precision measurement and sensing technologies.

feed.title: Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER Shares Sold by Pitcairn Co.
feed.summary: Pitcairn Co. has reduced its stake in Uber Technologies by 27.5%, selling 20,424 shares. This comes as Uber reported increased revenue but missed EPS expectations, leading to several price target reductions from analysts. Despite some positive signals like CFO share acquisition and strong gross bookings growth, the company faces internal reputational risks from CEO comments and ongoing litigation.

feed.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd. $TSM Stock Holdings Trimmed by Pitcairn Co.
feed.summary: Pitcairn Co. reduced its stake in Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSMC) by 29.2% in the third quarter, selling 10,127 shares and holding 24,527 shares valued at $6.85 million. Despite this trimming, TSMC is accelerating AI-focused capacity with a new "mega fab" and may benefit from Nvidia reallocating production to higher-value chips. The company faces near-term uncertainty due to U.S./China export controls and profit-taking by global funds, but analysts largely maintain a "Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $391.43 after a strong quarter.

feed.title: Rovida Investment Management Ltd Purchases New Stake in Alibaba Group Holding Limited $BABA
feed.summary: Rovida Investment Management Ltd recently acquired a new stake of 20,000 shares in Alibaba Group Holding Limited, valued at approximately $3.57 million, making it their 16th largest position. Analyst sentiment for Alibaba is generally bullish, with an average rating of "Moderate Buy" and a price target of $195.17. Despite some near-term uncertainty due to the unexpected resignation of the Qwen AI division head, Alibaba's management is actively forming a task force and recruiting AI talent, indicating continued investment in the area.
